My heart's pounding and stuff!" Swish, swish, swish. "I feel the same as usual. It's just a different outfit." Whoosh, whoosh, whoosh. "Yes. The dress is just a garnish to an already beautiful dish. What's important is showing how you normally are to your fans." "Oh, I see. How I normally am... Okay! Then, let's have a match to see who can get to the studio first!" "Hey! Wait a second!" "Haha, that's definitely how she normally is. All right, let's get a move on, too!" "Geez. Fine!" Tat, tat, tat! Tat, tat, tat! Tat, tat, tat! Their hems flutter, and their footsteps overlap into a sweet and pleasant chorus.
88.30062: "Sniff, sniff... Wow... It smells amazing. This must be the legendary makunouchi-style carrot lunchbox!" "Spe, let's wait until after rehearsal to have lunch." "Suzuka! Do you know where my gloves are?" "Didn't you tell the wardrobe assistant to make some adjustment to them?" Backstage, things are hectic, so there's no time to relax. But there's a part of me that finds this... ...quite special. "Perhaps it's because I'm here with you two." "SU-ZU-KAAAA!" "I'm right here, Spe. Heh, what could it be this time?" Well, let's continue with our preparations. We'll put on a show bursting with cheer.
88.30063:
Cleat Order No. 0723586
-----------------------------

Client: Mejiro McQueen
Size: Fit to measurements, with 0.1 mm leniency
Material: UMAGANE brand aluminum alloy

Other: The seventy-five-gram plate was not quite heavy enough for client's needs. Use an eighty-gram plate under the toe of the shoe, and thicken the sole accordingly. The cleats will be worn daily for race training, so the client will need a dozen spare plates in addition to the ones affixed to the cleats. Client is able to pick up the adjusted cleats in-store today.

-----------------------------

"...McQueen. I believe this should be all the information needed for your order."

"Thank you so much! I'm impressed you even adjusted the shoes' weight to my needs."

"Of course. Small details can have a large impact on a racer's future. A well-fitted pair of cleats is an invaluable partner on any Umamusume's journey."

"Well, I'm certainly feeling confident about this new pair. Hehe, I can't wait to try them on!"

"Yes... I'm looking forward to it as well."
88.30064: Grrrrr! You've awoken the mummies... The three teeerrible mummies! The feisty corpse who boasts divine speed and can never say no to a festival—Inari Mummy! The cadaver who'll snuggle ya up for eternity in her embalmed embrace—Super Mummy! And me, Naniwa's quickest carcass, the White Lightning—Tamamo Mummy! Pretty sick, huh? Picked up that little title for how my bandages streak through the night as I run. Now... do ya still think you've got what it takes to beat us, Indiana Oguri?! H-hey! Don't just stand there eatin' pumpkin pie! We're tryin' to do a bit here! Ughhh, and ya had to do it after the rest of us did the dorky poses. ...A do-over? Nuh-uh! You are NOT gettin' me to say that crap again! ...It's embarrassing, ya idiot!
88.30065: As the night of Halloween approaches, the air is rife with mischief as a lone girl calls upon the witch of legend. The witch surveys her timid visitor curiously, then flashes her a smile—a challenge. "I won't go easy on you, you know." "Yes, I understand that. But I seek your guidance nonetheless... for there is a wish I must grant!" The witch's eyes widen, impressed. She'd half expected the girl to shrink away. With a nod, she holds out her wand. The girl takes it, and raises it to the sky. "My dear friend... This time, I'll be there for you." Her words resound within the witch with such confidence, such warmth... they foretell great heroism in the small girl's heart.
88.30066: The ghost stands there with her back to me, lost in thought. All this time, she'd been working so hard—ever so hard—to accomplish an important mission all on her own. For you see, the ghost was afraid. She thought the others would be disappointed if she asked for help. That she'd be a failure. But that's not true... "I..." The feelings she'd been holding back start to spill out, word by word, and I think to myself: You know, the reason you worry about the others... is because you're so kind. —Excerpt from The Ghost and the Vampire, a Hand-drawn Halloween Tale
88.30067:
On the throne sits Symboli Rudolf, the Emperor who stands above all. Her austere appearance is a reflection of her unrivaled record.

Two Umamusume stand by her side, enamored by her influence—the talented Tokai Teio, who aims to follow in the Emperor's undefeated foosteps, and the tough Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi, who charges forward through sheer force of will.

"I'll definitely surpass her."
"I'll never give up."

The Emperor's lips slowly curl upwards into a smile. In her eyes, two futures are reflected, each shining as brilliantly as the other.
88.30068: I'm going to be waving my arms to make the sleeves fan out in half-moon circles... and the lights were positioned on that side of me during the rehearsal... so I should angle my head this way to really make my lipstick shine... "Yup, that's perfect! ♪" I've gotta visualize what'll show off my charm the best. They gave me this opportunity expecting #CuteCurren, and that's what I'm gonna give them. I'll do my makeup extra bold to bring out the festival mood—and to go the extra mile for the people waiting for me. But... ohhh, I wanna make it even cuter. "They're all cheering me on, so I'm gonna be the cutest I've ever been!"
88.30069: The smallest flicker in the coals can stoke a flame in the heart. The heat rises—boiling my blood, blinding and deafening me to all else. All I can feel is my own heartbeat, hammering at the bars of its cage. I fight to hold it back; the smoldering ashes fill my lungs, suffocating me. So I won't stifle the blaze any more. I'll let it run free. I'll run wild and free, and— I'll devour everything in my path! "It's time. Let's begin, Brian." "Heh. My mind's already on the hunt."
88.30070:
A light festival beat drums to life, and the dancers lift their feet. With each swing of the music and swing of their fans, the moonlight behind them is shaped into crescent arcs.

"Hah! Haaah!"

The lanterns flicker and swoon, glistening in the onlookers' eyes. All are fixed on the girl in the center of the light, but she offers her gaze to a distant view.

(I'm really danc'n it up... but I still feel like the same frumpy ol' me!)

"Be! Brighter!"

"Yukino's really going for it! ♪ I'd better step up my game too!"

"They're both getting so fired up... So I'll turn up the heat myself!"

With each step forward, the others race to keep up—to overtake. As the dancers whirl in and out of the lead, the true message of the festival takes shape.

"Ooh, I'm not giv'n up! I'll be the best danc'r of all!"

Everyone smiles, and the dance continues. The stage tonight is a celebration—a dedication that shines as bright as any big-city track.
88.30071: Comin' to you live—it's D! J! DAITAKU HELIOOOS! WOOOO! "Sheeeesh, you guys are on fire! ☆ But I think we can crank up the heat even more! I'll give you the cues, so let's! Get! LOUUUUD!" WOOOOOOO! "Yeah, that was a good warm-up. ♪ Now, right side of the stands, lemme hear where you're at!" WOOOOO! "Left side, lezzgo!" WOOOOO! "Center stands, make some noooise! ☆" WOOOOO! "All together now... IT'S PARTY TIME!" PARTY TIIIIME! "The vibes are off the charts! I am LOVING the energy, so keep it comin'! ♪ You guys make me wanna sing and shout!" "I can't hold back any longer... I gotta drop some beats! I'm takin' you all with me on a crazy setlist, so get ready to rooock! ☆"
88.30072: Today's an extra special day! It's like everyone's hearts are wrapped up in ribbons like presents, waiting for someone to open up all the feelings inside! "C'mon, Trainer, over here! You're gonna love the party we put together!" Smiles warm enough to melt away the cold. Laughter that rings out through the silent night! A party that shines brighter than all the stars twinkling in the sky! Ooh, it's so magical! A winter miracle! "Isn't this fun? I knew you'd like it! I just had to bring you!" I want you to see all the effort I put in. I want you to praise me. I want you to be happy. And maybe... maybe that's childish. An adult wouldn't get all flustered and excited over this, but... But y'know what? It's a special holiday! It's a special day to do special stuff with a special someone. I just wanna put a big sparkly bow on it... And give it all to you!
88.30073:
Starlight dapples the stone with every step,
You rush ahead a tile and a half,
Too stubborn... too stubborn to look back yet.

Patchworks of people line the market;
You weave through crowds like the needle tracks
And I'm the thread pulled idly past

Warm glows emanate from rows of stalls,
Stringlit wares, shiny baubles.
Steam rises over hot chocolate cups
Cinnamon scents blend into the dusk—

"What's the hold-up? Don't get separated..."
I realize you've turned my way and waited.

I nod and you avert your gaze
Stubborn again, a tile and a half away,
Not a step further, not a step less 
Keeping me close and distant yet.

Occasionally, you glance back at me
And I pretend I didn't see
I somehow feel, if our eyes meet...
This precious moment will abruptly end
And next I know, you'll be tiles ahead.

On this holy night, walking moonlit streets,
I keep your pace carefully, 
And you lead our way slowly, gently.
88.30074: "It's snowiiing! ☆★ Mayano, look! Snow as far as the eye can see!" "Oh wow! ♡ Let's go play, Marvey! What should we do first?" "How about a marvelous snowball fight? ☆ I'm gonna get you! ★" "Ah! That's freezing! Now you're in for it... Take this! ☆" "I'm not going down that easily! Ready? Maaarvelous! ☆★" Three hours later... "Whew... That was a marvelous match. ★" "Yeah, but I am wiped. I think that's enough playing in the snow for one day." "Enough... playing? ...No! There's never enough playing!" "Huh?! But we've been playing for hours!" "And the snow will melt!" "Yeah, when spring comes." "Exactly! So we've gotta play with it now! Right now! I don't want this marvelous moment to end... I wanna spend more marvelous time with you. ☆★" "I guess... you've got a point. So y'know what? Let's do this! ☆" "Ahahaha! Let's play with this marveous snow until it melts! ☆ And then in spring, we'll find another marvelous thing to play with! ★ And just like that, the whole year will be extra super-duper maaarvelous! ☆★☆"
88.30075:
I run. And run. And run... But it's not enough to pass the obstacles between us, let alone catch her.

I turn. Again. Again. Around I go... Up... and down. My mind reels—colors blur past—like I'm running atop a giant gear.

And then, I hear someone singing. It's beautiful... but the song isn't meant for me. I think... this whole time, I wasn't looking ahead of me. I was just watching her back.

That's right. All I saw was her. I couldn't see anything else. I wasn't running cleanly—I was running desperately, frantically... just trying not to lose sight of that faint shadow.

There's something stirring in me, diluting the essence of what I was. Transforming me into another gear on the track, chasing her loop after loop.

With each revolution, I lose more of myself. The clamor feels so far away. I can't make out whether the blurred mob shouts in cheer or fury.

As it all melts together into an indiscernible cacophony, one thing alone remains quiet and true—a thin thread—the path cleared in your wake.

(You're still there. And I'm still following!)

The golden disc beneath us whirls. I reach out, stretching my hand to hers—

...And in that moment, I left the world behind.
88.30076:
There's a scenery I see when I close my eyes.

Into the blinding flare of colors pouring over the horizon, figures run away from me toward the light. I'm standing there, watching their shadows, when I hear a distant call...

I can't quite place when or where the episode took place. I've racked my memories to no avail.

And so... It must have been something I saw in a dream. Some sort of nightmare—something dreadful I hoped would never come to pass.

I'm confident in that answer.

...Because when I open my eyes again, I see something completely different.

"Silence Suzuka! Silence Suzuka has done it again! A stunning runaway victory!"

I'm not really interested in daydreaming up what-ifs or letting nightmares cloud my vision.

I want to see new scenery—unimaginable ones—and I want to see it with my own two eyes.

Today. Tomorrow. Every day. Forever!
88.30077: "Oh, can this truly be? Before me stands a star, with beauty that could almost rival my own! Ahhh, you must be the Leporello to my Don Giovanni!" "Wowzers! Ayabe's kimono was the exact same pattern as I foresaw in my dream! Fortune has truly come to us today, pals—all thanks to the great Shiraoki!" "Ahaha! Ayabe, you look so pretty! Ehehe, I bet I know your secret too. You must've eaten tons of New Year's mochi, making your skin all mochi-smooth and soft! We should make a batch together!" "The year just started, and it's already chaos... Sigh... I guess I'm in for another craz—" "W-wa-watch ouuut! S-sorry everyone, but I don—I don't think I can stop! I'm going to crash!" "Ah?! W-wait, don't come barreling at me! "
88.30078: "Oh nooo, it's almost time for the karuta championship! Oh no, no, no, no! M-my hands... are shaking... W-what am I going to dooo?!" "For starters, you could sing Shiraoki's New Year's Fortune-Fishin' Song! If you say the words and dance the steps, luck's sure to come your way!" "Bring on the boons, gimme good luck! ♪ Grab your shades, here comes a bright New Year's dawn! ♪ The sun's a-rising, Mount Fuji's snowy cap is shining ♪ With a rosy smile singin' woooiya hoiya ♪ Fortune's on the way! ♪" "Woooiya hoiya! Fortune's on the way... ♪ Ehehe, you're right. I can' help but sing along." "Exactamundo! I'll lead you in with another verse, and then you take the next! Lucky lucky me, with my lucky pine sprigs ♪ Everybody gather 'round for some festivities ♪ Watch for hawks like you saw in your lucky dreams ♪ Playin' fukuwarai with a woooiya hoiya, ♪ Fortune's on the way! ♪" "Lucky lucky me, eating a New Year's feast ♪ Ultra super happy, life always has me winning ♪ Everything's so tasty, but don't eat the eggplant yet ♪ Save a taste of luck and woooiya hoiya ♪ Fortune's on the way! ♪" "Yep, I'm sure Shiraoki heard that prayer loud and clear, and sent a big ol' treasure ship of luck your way!"
88.30079:
I have so many goals I haven't reached yet... So many big, grand dreams of who I want to be—of a Doto who stands on top of the world with confidence.

If I could just reach the summit, I'm sure I'd be able to stand up straight and proud. But... I can't reach it, no matter how much I climb.

S-so maybe, I need to try standing a little taller. It's okay if no one notices a difference but me... I'll straighten my back just a bit, and let you give me a push.

And I won't look back, no matter how much I want to. And every time I think those bad thoughts, I'll remind myself to stand up just a little taller. I'll remember the warm hands holding me up.

Without another thought, words well up in me.

"I-I can... I can reach it!"
88.30080: "Is this... It's that old scroll of secret acupuncture techniques I borrowed from my master (without permission)! Wow, what a blast from the past! ☆ I never actually finished reading more than half, huh... Let's give it a little look-see." One must seek the mystic truths of Umamusume yet unveiled. One must commit to body and heart the weight of their actions. One must respect experience over talent. One must resist worldly temptations, and devote themself to training. One must remember that the needle moves as the heart does, confident or hesista— "Ah, wait! I almost forgot! I was boiling water for my ramen." "There, that's the cup noodles all watered up, but... Agh, I've gotta have something around that I can weigh down the lid with... C'mon, c'mon..." "Oh! I can just use the scroll! Boom, easy! It's nice and heavy, so it should hold the lid down perfectly. Wow, no worry! ☆" ...Three minutes later, Anshinzawa goes to get her ramen, and topples the cup over scroll-first. Not wow, all the worries.
88.30081:
Hey, that photo we took has arrived! Huh... what's up with this shadow? Don't tell me—it's the ghost of a football fish!

"Eek! The g-ghost of a football fish? Wh-where is it?!"

"Rice, please calm yourself. You should know not to take Gold Ship's remarks at face value."

"Uwaaagh! This is sooo touching! The tears, they just keep falling!"

"Didn't you cry enough back then? ...Sheesh, how do you still have tears to shed?"

"Ahaha... Oh, that's right! I gotta show Suzuka, too!"

"I thought you'd say that, so I had them send over the image data as well. Hehe, despite all the ups and downs we've gone through together, you all haven't changed one bit, have you?"

"Yup, yup! This is Team Sirius at its best, and I looove it!"

"M-mhm... I agree. Everyone's the same, but that's just fine... Hehe."

"Hmph. Well, it isn't a bad feeling, at least."

"You guys are totally right! That's why we should keep getting along as Team Sirius!"

"Let's stick together and give it our all—yeah!

"H-hey, why'd you take my line?!"
88.30082:
It's important to have a little courage. That's all it takes to make your first baby steps forward.

Take everything you're feeling and mix it up like cake batter. With a little time and warmth, your love will puff up extra soft and sweet, and then you can give it to someone with a big shiny ribbon!

Use that little bit of courage to perk your chin up and look them in the eyes, then say...

"Will you... accept this?"

My hands may shake a bit, but I do my best to put on a little smile.

Because I want to tell them—I want them to know how I feel!
88.30083:
"FLOUR! BUTTER! FLOUR! BUTTER! CREAM! AND CREAM!"

Recipes are naught but dead weight. Low temperatures are for slow bakers—not for her. All she knows is speed. Blinding, Bakushin speed.

"Whoa?! I accidentally got cream all over my face! ...Mmm! It's so delicious!"

"And now, for the final garnish—sakura! SAKURA! SAKURAAA!"

The flowers spring forth in intense bloom, the petals speeding toward the sky in a mad dance. In but a blink, the kitchen is sakura pink.

"There! All done! One Bakushin batch of sweets!"

With a proud puff of her chest, she hands the tray to me, and I can't help but crack a smile myself.

There's cream all over her hands, and sakura petals all over her clothes, but I think... that in and of itself is kinda sweet.

"HAAAHAHAHA! That look on your face—it's plain as day! You're over the moon for these sweets!"
88.30084: "Um, do I spread my fingers like this?" "Yep, just like that. Hang tight while I do the other hand, m'kay?" Is Flower even enjoying this? I have like literally no idea if this is the right way to cheer her up... I mean, when do I ever think before I act? Why won't the right words come to me? Why is it so hard to come up with something she'd like? But... Ugh, I can't just leave her hanging. I've gotta do something to help. Something... So I guess I'll just do what I do best and hope it works out. "Wow, it's so pretty! I feel like a big grown-up lady now!" "Wait, for real? Like you actually like it?" "Of course! My nails look amazing!" Whoa, nailed it! Guess it just goes to show that sometimes thinking gets you nowhere. You've just gotta give things a go!
88.30085: We're at a meet and greet for a popular Umadol. With a copy of the new album in hand, Agnes Digital gets in line for a signature. "Oh no... Oh noooonono aaaaashjsd?! Her hair is so glossy... I'm definitely seeing a real halo there! Omg, I think she might actually be an angel!" "I can't believe she's here, in person... breathing the same air as us humble simps... How saintly! How benevolent!!!" "Aaasdh wait, the closer the line gets, the clearer I can see her! Hwaaaah, the photo on the album cover's gorgeous, duh, but she's like a million billion times more radiant in person..." "I'm ascending... Take me up, sweet ange—Gasp. I-I almost actually ascended there for a second. She's radiating dangerous levels of moe and I'm not sure I can get any closer—HELP." "All right. Okay. Just stay calm. Focus... This is no time to be swooning! I've gotta simulate the convo in my head so I don't say anything weird to her." "Okay, so I've gotta walk up there confidently, y'know like normal confident but not so much that it looks unnatural, right? And then she'll sign the album, and then I'll say, 'Thank you! I'm always cheering for you!' and then get outta the way lightning fast so I don't take up any of the next fan's time... Yeah. That's the plan." "We've all gotta be on our best behavior, or they might not do signings for us anymore... I've gotta make a good impression and show her what an honor it is to simp for her! I've got this!! Hang tight, I'm up next!!!!!!" With that, Agnes Digital walks forth gallantly, as though I'm watching a knight approach her lord. Bold, and strong... I think.
88.30086: 3,000 long, stamina-draining meters. A long, perilous slope stretching from the third corner. A difficult track that cannot be conquered with effort alone. A stream of sweat drips from her brow, threatening to blur her vision. Her heart beats frantically, like it's screaming for more oxygen to pump through her veins. Each rough breath scratches at her throat like flickers of flame. She asks herself why. Why does she keep running, when it hurts so much? Why does she continue to drag her heavy legs step after arduous step? Her mind doesn't have time to process an answer. But her ears flick unconsciously towards a rumble from the stands. A roar of cheers—of fans' hopes and dreams. She then clenches her teeth, biting down into the pain, and spitting it out. A sense wells in her gut—her fated rival is behind her. The large shadow she casts over the turf is getting closer. Closer. Closer. But she knows she can't look back. She won't give up. The only way to reach the peak is to keep running. ...And that day, the runner who refused to surrender took the crown of the best.
88.30087: "Huh? Is this thing... Oh no, Bright! Bright, stop! That's enough! ...I'm so sorry. I think the timer's display is messed up." "Huff... Huff... Whew. Now that you mention it, that last set felt oddly long." "Oh gosh... That was probably as long as three sets. A-are you okay?" "Mm-hm, just peachy." "You still have stamina after all that?! You must be really on top of your training! Do you think you still could have kept going if I didn't stop you?" "Ehehe, probably. Honestly, I probably wouldn't have noticed the timer wasn't working if you hadn't said anything." "Ahahaha! That's so like you! I guess some things never change. Hehe... Maybe it's because of how long I've known you, but seeing you crush that set has me all happy." "That's sweet of you to say. It's a good thing I've been training hard to live up to the Mejiro name. I suppose I'll have to keep on improving myself, little by little."
88.30088:
"So, how's it been since you two came to Tracen? Is it different than you expected?"

"Yes... It certainly isn't anything like I imagined. What about you, Kita?"

"Same. It's way different from what I thought."

"Huh? I-in a good way or a bad way? I hope you two aren't disappointed..."

"No, of course not. If anything... It's been far lovelier than I could have dreamed! The training, the races—everything's been so magical!"

"Yeah, me too! With all the exciting stuff going on, it feels like every day's a festival!"

"Whew... That's good to hear. You had me worried for a second. But... I think I was the same way when I first came here too. All this fancy new stuff left 'n right, and special things happening one after another... Tracen's still full of surprises even for me!"

"Really? Even though you've been here so much longer than us?! Ooh, what're we gonna do, Dia?"

"Don't look at me—I'm just as curious as you are!"

"Ahaha, I'm sure there will always be big, wonderful surprises in store for all three of us!"

"Right!"
"Right!"
88.30089: The stands are roaring with excitement. In the crowd, one man whispers excitedly to himself in a trembling voice. "I've been waiting for this moment... She had high expectations placed on her, but she was never able to take home the gold... Just like me. But now, she's finally won... Because she believed in herself and never gave up." "Was that marvelous enough for everyone? ☆ All of you are looking oh-so marvelous as well! ★☆★" Warm tears run down the man's cheek. He has finally realized the truth that has been lying in front of him the whole time... "I'm... marvelous, too..." And so, another marvelous light is born into this marvelous world.
88.30090: Your fangs threaten to sink into me with every stEpisode Your graceful movements resemble a predator waiting for the right moment to strike the fatal blow. "I see that you're as sharp as ever. Perhaps you've been keeping up your training? How admirable." "Right, for once. Someone's got to protect our spoiled little Emperor from the eyes of the masses, now don't they? Not like you could do anything without being pampered." "Allow me to correct one of your statements. As I'm unable to resolve this matter expediently, I'll simply march to the beat of your drum for now." It's your turn, and the silence is deafening. I see your scorn replaced by apathy, when suddenly, a light bulb flashes above your head. "If that's how you want to play, then fine by me. But don't forget—you asked for this!" "Oh, such risky footwork! The most important thing between partners, Sirius, is trust. And so you don't forget it anytime soon, it's time for your private lesson." I can see your desire for control in each of your aggressive steps. In response, I will bring all I have and match you at every turn. Do not forget—you stand in the presence of the Emperor, Symboli Rudolf.
88.30091:
...Hey, what do you see from there? Sluggish shadows drifting through the night? Or perhaps dust from the dance floor, kicked up by someone's fancy footwork?

"Mhm, in there you'll only find a tent of tedium, spread around like a sloshy quagmire. They've only two choices—accept their muddy fates and sink, or writhe in vain defiance. How drab."

"However, I can present you with a third choice. Take my hand... and I'll show you how much fun this world can be."
88.30092:
Energy equals mass times the speed of light squared. In the end, everything comes down to equivalent exchange. What goes around, comes around. In other words, no matter how hard you try, you won't get any more than you put in... and that's fine by me.

"This is getting me hyped! It doesn't get better than !monad! Wooooo!"

That said, when needless noise gets mixed into the equation, all of that balance goes straight to chaos! But I won't stop...

"Fine by me. You want more? I'll give you more. I'll overload your senses until you drop!"

I live in a cache full of unknown variables...

"Come on, follow my groove! Ha... haha!"

Why am I trying so hard to suppress my laughter? ...Tch, guess I was the one being played. Well, I've solved the equation, so I'll pay my respects.

"...Until this beat of mine dies down, don't turn on the lights."
88.30093: I'm a fan of wearing blue and white. It's refreshing, but vibrant. Elegant, but not too pretentious. It's the number one color combo for the me I want to be. "Mhm, just like I thought—this is the number one fit for me! ♪" My outfit's all set. The frills and pleats look good, and I tied the big bow perfectly. A quick posture check... oh, and can't forget the smile! Yup, this is it—this is undoubtedly what an honor student on her day off looks like! "This is an important outing, so I have to make sure to go in my number one outfit! ♪"
88.30094:
You're always cheering somebody on. You encourage them, scold them, and share in their ups and downs.

Even today, you're cheering on someone from the stands up above. Despite waving a banner weighing easily over ten kilograms, you and everyone in the cheer squad continue cheering with your eyes fixed on the race, no matter how raspy your voices get.

You stand in the shadows, where light will never reach.

And yet, you continue exerting every last drop of your strength, all to fulfill your duty. You believe it's simply the right thing to do, and you take great pride in upholding this duty.

"Keep it up."

Suddenly, three words slip out of my mouth. They are spoken softly, quiet enough to be drowned out by even the sounds of everyday life. Words fated to drift away, and reach no other ears.

But then you turn around and face me, still waving your banner, and still cheering the racers on. It's only for an instant, as fleeting as the swaying of a flame in the wind, but I see it—your bright smile shining straight at me.
88.30095:
An exciting race unfolds itself before me as I watch from the stands up high. Every racer is bursting forward with impressive speed. Out of the blue, a strikingly loud voice rings throughout the venue.

"Nice turn! But they're hot on your heels! At this rate... Ah!"

I wonder who she's cheering for. She sounded pretty crushed just now...

"Good job, what a beautiful pass! I can tell you've been working on that! Now take it home—gooo!"

"Huh?! Weren't you cheering for the racer who was in the lead until now?"

The words spill out of my mouth, and the girl, Seeking the Pearl, looks at me with a warm smile.

"In a race, there'll always be a winner and a loser. There's always two sides, like light and darkness. But you know, when it comes to competitors giving it their all, everyone's the same, and I think we should celebrate that! Every racer deserves to be cheered for and praised! I support each and every one out there!"

Her words are pure and innocent, like a pearl. And in the face of her brilliance... I begin to see the world through a new lens.
88.30096: If I slip up even a little, they'll be hot on my heels. But wait, this sudden ovation of cheers during my most dire moment... This is just like... "Princess Fighter! Don't give up!" I'm in her shoes today, with everyone rooting for me the same way I used to cheer at the TV. "Now, Princess Fighter—punish evil!" She's the definition of a perfect princess, and my idol. "Gooo, Princess Fighter!" There's only one path left for me, for you see, a princess... "Never, ever loses!"
88.30097:
The track was in the worst possible condition. Even so, you treaded through the mud, broke out of the pack, and took the lead when no one else could.

Not even upturned turf, fierce rain, or racers blocking the way could stop you. You simply weaved your way past each competitor, leaving them behind, one after the other.

And each time you passed another racer, your sky-blue eyes shone brilliantly, as if you yourself had become like the vast sky—soaring freely forward, always just out of reach...

"Mr. C.B. finishes in first place! Mr. C.B. takes it all here at the first race of the Triple Crown!"

In that whirlwind of rain and mud, when visibility was at its worst, you stood above everyone else.

And then like a child, you wiped the mud off your cheek with the back of your hand, before slowly curling the corners of your mouth into an easygoing smile. Turning to the crowd, you stood tall and raised your hand to the sky.

Seeing that pose, the fresh memories of my bitter defeat instantly faded away, replaced by your gallant figure etched into my mind.
88.30098:
Brand new racewear for me! ♪ A first-place winner I'll be!

"With my racewear, I'm so happy! Running, running, yay! ♪"

"Hop, skip! Skip, hop! ♪ I'll give it my all, like 'blaaam!'"

A girl from my class is singing something to herself. It's not the first time she's done this, but for some reason, I find myself especially curious about her song today.

"...What kind of song are you singing?"

I walk up to her and ask a simple question. She looks like she's having so much fun, and her energy is infectious.

"Oh, it's my racewear song! I'm really looking forward to wearing it at my next race! I'll give it my all, like 'blaaaam!'"

She's singing because she's excited. And she's excited because she's going to run. Her explanation is so simple, but it resonates with me deeply.

"Good for you."

At some point, I forgot what it felt like to run for fun.

"Hey, do you wanna sing with me? Here, I'll count us in!"

"Whoa, r-right now?"

"A one, and a two! Hop, skip! Skip, hop! I'll give it my all! ♪"

"L-like 'blaaaam...'"

"Like 'blaaam!' Hehe, I can't wait for my next race!"

It's funny, I've only sung a single line with her, but I already feel a bit happier.

Right, races are supposed to be fun. There's no need to worry about the details. I just need to go out there and have fun!
88.30099:
Wow... Ikuno, you look so pretty... Just like a real bride!

"Thank you, Rice."

Wearing such splendid racewear in front of everyone... is making me surprisingly self-conscious. Still, this kind of opportunity doesn't come by every day. I just need to make it through this photo shoot...

"What?! Ikuno, you're getting married?! No way, since when?! I don't want you to gooo!"

"Huh? What're you doing, Turbo?! Look, you're getting in the shot, silly!"

"Nooo waaaaay! Don't leave me behiiind!"

Due to Turbo's misunderstanding, the photo shoot has been rendered into a state of mild disarray. That said, hearing the star front runner Turbo cry "Don't leave me behind!" is amusing in it's own way.

"Turbo, please calm down. I'm not going anywhere."

There's no way I'd leave now. After all, we're still in the middle of a race of our own.

Once we're done taking photos, I think I'll join Turbo and the others in their training.
88.30100:
Once upon a time, I went to a wedding.

When the bride smiled gently, the people around her also started smiling, and everyone was as happy as they could be. I'll always treasure that wonderful memory.

One day, I want to make everyone smile like that. I want to spread happiness to everyone around me. It's not much, but that's my dream.

I'll gather up my courage... and take that big step forwards. And once I do, I'll see smiles everywhere I look.

It'll be just like what the bride saw at that wedding—the sight of happiness. Up until now, I've only gotten a glimpse of that view.

"...I want to keep on making people smile."

I hope to keep on putting smiles on everyone's faces, so that someday, everyone can find their very own happiness.
88.30102:
Dober's way too nice. She's always overthinking things and worrying about others.

Why do I know this? Because she's saved me so many times with her kindness and thoughtfulness!

"...Let the match begin!"

Entering the ring from the red corner, we have Tracen Academy's Phantom Bird—Masked El!

And in the blue corner, we have her opponent, Señorita Mejiro—Worrywart Dober!

The rules are simple! Listen to Dober, talk with her, and make her smile for a perfect ring out! ...Haha, I've got this one in the bag!

"After all, with this mask on, I'm pumped up, confident—invincible, even!"
88.30103:
In a picturesque forest, two Umamusume swing from a single vine, riding the wind.

"Um, Taiki?"

"What's up? Somethin' in your noggin?"

"There's something I've always wanted to try if I ever got into a situation like this... Well, more like say? Or even shout? Anyways, there's something!

"Roger that, Tannhauser! We're birds of a feather!"

"Right! Then, on three... One, two... three!

"Ahhhhh! ♪"
88.30104:
A water spirit's shoreline, a fairy's secret garden, and a door only revealed by starlight... After overcoming countless trials, the townspeople had finally reached their destination. And now, in front of them, was the most beautiful sight in the world...

"Well, I'll be! The walls are glowing baby blue!"

"It's like we've entered another world... Who knew a place like this existed?"

Faced with such a dreamlike scene, the townspeople could only open their mouths in awe and say...

"Ahhh, this is it! We've really entered the world of that story!"
88.30105:
To become the best racer in all of Japan.

That was my dream. It was my everything—what I'd promised to my moms.

Still, dreams are funny things, aren't they? I wanted to grab hold of mine, but like mist on a cold morning, no matter how hard I tried, I couldn't. All I could do was try my hardest—to keep on reaching for something that couldn't be reached.

But it was worth it.

All of my experiences—everyone I've met along the way—helped make my dreams come alive! I've had nail-biting races against my rivals, and I overcame hurdles inside of me that I thought I couldn't. There's been tough times, even sad times. But there's also been fun times and happy times. Everything I've been through has helped shape my dream!

Do you have a dream? Or maybe a burning desire? Then let's go chase it together! I'll help make your dreams come true!
88.30106:
If she wins this race, then both mother and daughter will have conquered the Japanese Oaks—an unheard-of feat. The venue is filled with both expectations and doubts, each weighing heavily on this one racer's shoulders.

But the moment the Empress takes to the turf, all the commotion is blown away in a burst of wind. For her, even the wind is but another of her subjects. She heads towards the starting gate with confident strides.

Her sharp eyes demand absolute fealty from all who face her. Her fingers clench into a fist so tight her nails dig into her skin.

She desires perfection. She hungers for victory. Her pride as Empress is her weapon.

"This race is mine for the taking."
88.30172:
"Thank you for joining me at the baseball game today." 
> No problem! It was great fun! 
> (Thanks! sticker) 
"I'm glad you had a good time." 
"I might have behaved a tad immodestly at one point, 
but that was only because the game was just so heated. 
It's not every day that you see a comeback from 6 runs 
behind in the bottom of the 9th inning!" 
"Not that I would know, mind, it's just the gentleman 
in a nearby seat was saying so." 
"That runner's do-or-die base steal to tie the game, 
followed by a safety squeeze were particularly thrilling. 
To are such a play in professional baseball, and have 
the skils to pull it off. Remarkable!" 
> I see, that was really interesting, yeah! 
> (I'm learning! sticker) 
= 5 minutes later… 
"I apologize for the long messages earlier. 
In any case, it was incredibly worthwhile." 
"Should another opportunity arise, we should definitely 
go again. I honestly am not very knowledgeable on 
the topic, but I will accompany you if you wish." 
"[Team Victories da best! sticker]"
88.30173:
A [Melody] written in hoofprints 
on the staff named "turf". 
"Hahah… the esultazione within 
this race is without doubt!" 
This was what she longed for. 
This was what she adored. 
Obbligato? Accompagnamento? 
— Her part matters not. 
"Join me! Our session commences!" 
There is but joy to be found 
in the arrangement of hoofmarks!
88.30174:
Tonight is the "Mejiro's Christmas Night"… 
A special event on a special night, held by the Mejiro 
trainees for their unfailingly supportive fans. 
"W-Welcome to the Mejiro's Christmas Night! 
Please check in over here!" 
"Huh… you want a picture with me…!? 
…… O-Okay, I can do that……… C-Cheese!" 
That's why Dober, always so tense around others, was 
mustering all her courage to interact with the guests. 
"You're doing great, Dober… Your buccinator is still 
looking tight, but you're welcoming guests magnificently!" 
When I first started secretly looking out for her, I was 
worried she might be having a tough time… but it seems 
that there we no need for me to leave my post…… 
"Oh, what a wonderful night… to be given 
such a present by the Mejiros this year…" 
"… We all put a lot of effort into tonight, hoping that 
everyone would enjoy a wonderful christmas. It would 
make us all very pleased if you came away with some 
great memories." 
Even with ladies she has never met, she manages to 
converse in her own words, without drawing back. 
…… Before long, my zygomaticus major had relaxed 
quite a bit. That's right. Dober had always been like this. 
She always puts a brave step forwards when acting 
for someone, when helping others. 
She's a kind girl like that. 
"… Do your best, Dober!"
88.30175:
"Ms. Ramonu. Lunch has been served. ……Ms. Ramonu?" 
…… No response to my knocking either. 
Fully aware of my ill manner, I opened the door 
to the lounge. Ms. Ramonu was painting. 
It was an image I could not understand —— 
An abstract painting beyond the comprehension of others. 
I had heard about this from another maid. 
There had been a time when Ms. Ramonu's legs were weak, 
and she didn't partake in training during the winter. 
She had spent that time painting abstract images. 
Her fervor, her adulation, her passion, her melancholy —— 
She threw them all at the canvas. Her art, much like herself, 
was imbued with indescribable beauty. 
But why, why has she, at this point, taken up 
her brush once again? 
"… It falls far short of those times. But of course. 
These days, I can come face to face with my love." 
…… My breath was taken away even though I couldn't 
make sense of her words. Without knowing what had 
overcome her, I simply kept gazing at her beauty. 
"The snow has ceased. Let us talk of love.", I heard 
her murmur as I quietly vacated the room. 
…… All that would remain of our meeting was the work 
I hadn't finished, and the white canvas upon which 
she had painted the lushest of greenery.
88.30176:
On a certain day nearing Christmas —— 
"Mmm, it's tough to decide when faced with 
such a large variety of choices～" 
"Indeed… Ryan would likely be happy with 
anything, but… it's always nicer to find something 
that she would truly enjoy, isn't it?" 
"What do you think about horseshoes～? 
My dear sister Ryan patiently accompanied me 
in selecting a pair in the past～" 
"Therefore, I would like to take some time to carefully 
pick out a pair of horseshoes for her this time." 
"I see. So she waited patiently for Bright to decide which 
ones she wanted… Hehe, that's so like Ryan." 
"… I remember, when I was little, she held my hand on 
a stormy night full of thunder. Even though she disliked 
staying up late, she stayed with me the whole night…… 
I always thought I couldn't compare to that." 
"What'd be a good way to repay her… maybe something 
for good sleep? But I'm pretty sure she sleeps well as is…" 
"The store will be closing in 30 minutes. 
We look forward to you next visit." 
"Whoah, it's that time already?!" 
…… Uhhh, What do I do… I'm having a harder 
time picking something than I expected…" 
"That's perfectly fine, Dober. 
You must take your time in expressing gratitude, 
otherwise your feelings might not reach～" 
"…… Heh. Bright could be very right. 
Well, let's come look around more tomorrow then."
88.30177:
Vivlos sets off running. 
The media folk gathered were not done 
asking questions, but quickly realizing 
she could not stand motionless in this moment, 
a wry smile simply formed on their faces. 
Though she must be incredibly tired, the reason 
her steps were light as a feather nonetheless 
could be seen at the end of her gaze. 
"Heey, siiiis～～～! First! 
I came first! I really did it!" 
There was Verxina, meeting her guileless little sister 
running straight at her, no eye for anything else, 
with open arms and an emotional expression. 
"Vivlos… thank you…! 
You ran an incredible, fantastic final leg. 
Those 7cm I couldn't close… 
The things I couldn't see behind them… 
You revealed them to me today." 
"Ehehe～ I have a second stomach for compliments～～♪" 
"… While I still thought of you as my cute, 
needy little sister, somewhere along you've 
become so strong." 
"Well my older sister's well known for her spirit, 
so of course I'll win if I set my thoughts on it! 
Ah, but even so, I'll always be a cute little sister♡" 
"Hahahah, I guess so. I'd love to see you 
being cute and strong out there." 
"Yeah! I'm gonna go win a lot! 
In huge races, or against powerful opponents! 
And I'll always come back for your compliments♪ 
What do you think? Deal?♡"
88.30178:
"Duramente drifts far to the outside! 
A mistake likely to cost her dear!!" 
I can hear the roars of the crowd between 
that of the wind rushing past my ears. 
I feel removed from my body, like it is not my own. 
(Have I lost my composure…?!) 
No, it's not that. It's not nerves sending shivers 
through me, but something deep inside, an urge —— 
"Haaaaaaaaaaah!!" 
"Duramente from the outside! Can you believe it, 
Duramente has found a way from the outside!!" 
That's right… it's the urge in my blood, the pride 
within its line. It stimulates me, encouraging, 
emboldening, to prove that I am the "strongest". 
"Is this what she is capable of!? Duramente!!"
88.30179:
Hanachōzu; floating flowers in a Shinto ablution basin. 
Spectacular colors adorning a new year still far 
from springtime's blossoming buds. 
Both of us momentarily taken by their beauty. 
Our wishes are like buds waiting to open — those were 
the words softly leaving your lips. To let them bloom. 
For each of the numerous flowers laying within 
the basin, so too a wish lay within me. 
Plip-plop, plip-plop. One by one, droplets fell 
underneath this branch of the Satono tree, 
drawing expanding rings upon the water's surface. 
I am reminded of drops from days past, drops which 
followed the curves of my cheeks. 
The pile of unflowering flowers. 
I'll let them blossom this time, on the most 
floriferous once in a lifetime stage. 
I'll let these flowers — these wishes — reach full bloom, 
like this beautiful hanachōzu. 
"Yeah. We'll have them blooming, without fail." 
You nodded your head, with a smile as warm as 
the sunlight stretching over the buds.
88.30180:
Trainees — born to run, they take on names 
of another world, succeeding their corresponding spirit 
and accompanying histories, both brilliant and tragic. 
Through their many races, these girls eventually 
become part of history themselves. 
"I'll be Japan's number one trainee!" 
She makes this vow to her two mothers. Harboring her 
ambition to be "Japan's number one", a girl leaving behind 
her hometown encounters rivals, competes with them 
in races, and through her victories and defeats eventually 
turns that dream of hers into reality. 
"I'll win regardless." 
A "sovereign" chasing after the "emperor". 
Spurred by an unyielding spirit, she fought through 
repeated setbacks to accomplish miracles in front of 
the friends who always ran by her side and the rival 
who supported her all the way. 
"Everyone said they want to see me run…" 
A young girl in awe of the unbreakable "sovereign". 
Together with her bosom friend with whom she exchanged 
a promise, she jumped into the world of racing. 
Though beset by doubt in her own dream, she managed 
to find herself, becoming a festival girl beloved by all. 
All said —— 
"Ah, over here, Spe!" 
"Wooh, made it～! My battle meal was 
more delicious than I anticipated…" 
"Geez～ The race is about to start! 
—— Ah, I know! Why don't we race to the paddock? 
We can establish which one of us is number one♪" 
"Oh, that sounds fun! Wanna have a go at it, Spe?" 
"Of course! I might have arrived last, 
but I'm gonna finish first～!" 
"Okaay, get ready… go!!" 
The road they travel has not yet reached its end.
88.30182:
The reflection in her eyes is that of a bright light. 
The familiar faces at the familiar assembly hall 
in her hometown.

"You've gotten so good at singing and dancing…! 
It's no wonder you're the face of our town!" 
"For sure, thanks to her we see bunches of tourists 
passing through. She's our hope and our pride!"

A tingle spreads through her eyes at the kind words 
and smiles around her. She can't help it. 
For that once dim light was now sparkling brightly, 
surrounded by great wide smiles.

"This is the last one! Titled ——" 
"'Come with me, Tomakomai!'"

No matter how much mud she's covered in, or how many 
times she stumbles, she'll always keep running. 
To protect the place she holds dear, the place she 
never wants to lose, with her own two legs.
88.30183:
Yuki seems to have found a recipe for one of 
her hometown's sweets in her room. 
When she said "It's been a while since I made these～", 
I asked if I could join her to watch, and — wow, she's really 
good at this! Quick, deft, and amazingly attentive!!

"Amazing!! So pinching them just right 
at the end is an important step!!" 
"You're really good at this, Yuki! Even getting all 
those little details perfect! It's really amaaaazing!!"

"O-Oh please, Ticket, you're exaggerating a bit～" 
"But… thanks. It makes it real happy to hear♪ 
Alriiight, I'm gonne give it one more push～!"

She seems to really enjoy making sweets! 
Looking at her makes me want to do it myself too. 
I think there's a headscarf and apron in my locker… 
Right, let's make some sweets!! 
Just need to figure out which ones…

"Ah, I know!" 
With an idea in mind, I got to work. 
I think this is going pretty well!? 
"The ears go… there!! And then, place little 
bits of red bean paste… veeery caaaarefully…"

"It's doooooooone!!!!" 
"Oooh, what a charming lil' thing～♪ 
The smile makes it look real sweet."

"Ehehe～! That's because it's you!! 
You looked so happy making sweets it made me want 
to try too, and so I thought I should make one of you!"

"Huh!? You mean this cutie is supposed to be me!? 
…Ooh. I feel so happy." 
"Yeah, that expression! It's the exact same!!" 
"Ehehe…… Ticket, seeing your expression right now 
makes me want to make one of you too. Is that okay? 
"Y-Yuuukiiiiiiii!! Of course it's okaaaaaaaay!!"
88.30184:
[Introduction] 
As everyone's trusted class president, I have taken it 
upon me to pack my feelings of gratitude into confections!! 
A beautiful feeling it is, gratitude! 
And what more could bring to mind beauty 
than the sakura cherry trees!! 
Therefore, I have made these confections 
in the shape of the sakura's petals! 
And the results are beautiful indeed! 
It is beauty x beauty, after all!! 
—— Sakura Bakushin O

Though gratitude is but a single word, I believe 
it comes in many shapes and sizes. 
I have thus adapted Bakushin O's idea of wanting to make 
confections in the sakura's petal shape similarly. 
Five pieces represent the lovely petals. 
Five colors represent the varied forms of gratitude. 
Please enjoy them from the moment you open the box♪ 
—— North Flight

[Menu/Contents] 
1. Gratitude to vitality. 
A crunchy cookie! 
The bright yellow color gives you energy!

2. Gratitude to kindness. 
Deliciously sweet mochi cake! 
Let its cute pink color warm your heart!

3. Gratitude to smiling. 
A soft and fluffy dango! 
A white as pure as a friendly smile for infectious laughter!

4. Gratitude to discipline. 
A slightly tough thin, baked okaki mochi slice! 
A gentle sweetness slowly spreads in your mouth!

5. Gratitude to dreams. 
A glittering gold leaf yokan! 
Towards a greater, sparkling future together!
88.30185:
"Hmm, a vintage-style jacket? …Oh, I know this brand! 
Hmm, I wasn't aware they made things like this now! 
Their high class aura is fantastic. 
I remember talking about it to my mother… uhh, ahem. 
Thank you very much, Ms. Flight. 
You managed to bring out a whole new side while 
still matching my majesty with great style. 
…Truly the work of a fashionista!"

"Wowie, street style! An oversized hoodie 
with short pants, and playful platform sneakers… 
Hehehe, just talking about it makes me 
want to head out already♪ 
Hit up a popular spot and show off～! 
Why don't we have a little Umasta Live 
together when I do, Flight?"

"Whoa… can't you only get these accessories 
in some concept shops? You really get around, Flight. 
We should swap info again some time, I've got 
info about the newest items to share. 
…But for real, mad props to your research."

You, and you. And of course, me! 
We're all unpolished gems, with our 
glittering potential hidden. 
I want to polish these gems, to show their beauty! 
Nothing makes me happier than accomplishing that. 
Come to me, my pretty new gemmie! 
Let's find a way to make you shine!
88.30186:
Allow me to ascertain with whom I shall have 
the pleasure of competing this time —— 
 
"I am extending to you the privilege to witness 
my gold-clad supremacy up close." 
 
"It's gonna be tons of fun, ya know? 
Blasting past all these faces and straight 
to the top, I mean!" 
 
"I can't complain about competition like you. 
Worthy opponents against which to prove 
my overwhelming strength and lineage…" 
 
"I'm gonna win! I will… carve a path 
to the Tiara with my victory!" 
 
My, how wonderful. Each of these lovely ladies 
sparkling like a diamond, and just as tough… 
"—— All the more reason to shatter them."
88.30187:
Bathe in the splendor of her goblet. 
An impassioned sovereign reigns supreme. 
From the turf's summit, trampling all before her. 
Her supremacy a beautiful art. 
Her course a raging storm. 
The whole world enveloped in her richest gold. 
Surrender, worship, kneel down. 
For we can only live in awe of her nobility.
88.30188:
She has a passion that she wishes to share. 
She has emotions that she wishes to convey. 
That's why I am searching every day. 
For the stages on which her dreams 
shine their brightest. 
For the moments in which her spirit 
sparkles with luminous purity. 
 
"What do you think, Ryouka? 
Can you feel my roaring spirit!?" 
 
"Definitely, you're looking great, Elfie. 
The camera does nothing to diminish your enthusiasm!" 
"Alright, let's roll with this take. Good work, Elfie!" 
 
"Woohoo! Thanks!" 
"Ehehe～ I hope everyone enjoys our new video!" 
 
"Don't worry. I'm sure they will." 
 
After all, you're shining like a star. Your brilliant 
light never-ending, imparting a certain strength 
to the many people watching. 
 
And… to have that light reach every corner and 
bring out the very best in you, that is is my job. 
 
"Oh yeah, Ryouka! 
I'd like to ask you something about our next project 
once we're done here, if you don't mind ——" 
 
"Oh, really? Well why don't we have a brief chat 
about it right now then? We finished the shoot 
with no issues anyway." 
 
"O-Okay! It's all about being quick and logical, huh!" 
 
"Heheh…… I guess so." 
 
It's time again, today. 
Time to create memorable entertainment. 
—— With the best partner I could ask for.
88.30189:
They stood hand in hand. 
Excited at the prospect of their dream. 
Together they pushed open its gates. 
 
"I'll get there! I'll be just like the mighty Teio! 
Just you wait and see!" 
"I'll be the sparkle of the Satono family! 
Just like McQueen sparkled!" 
 
The things they admired shaped their dreams. 
Their many encounters gave color to their futures. 
A world of their own spread out infinitely before them —— 
 
"I'm taking one step ahead, Dia!" 
"Yeah. I'll chase you… and definitely catch up." 
 
Their path diverged, each following their own. 
Only to cross again, and the two to clash. 
 
"Dia… I've waited so long for this day to come!" 
"Me too. But… I'll be victorious and surpass you." 
"Come and try!" 
 
—— It's time for them to let go of each other's hand. 
To reach out for a radiance only one can grasp!
88.30190:
The pinnacle is what she seeks. 
Disregarding nine months of forced absence 
to carve her bloodline further into the pages of history. 
 
"I'll provide proof — that I am 
irrefutably the strongest in history." 
 
Glory is what she seeks. 
Stamping the Satono family's mark on her achievements 
to live up to the expectations of her lineage. 
 
"Even if I'm never the favorite, I won't give in until 
I claim victory — watch me overcome adversity!" 
 
When they seek the same "ideal", it is inevitable 
they meet in races, competing for glory. 
 
"I'll bring you to your knees!" 
"I'll show you my perfect plan!" 
 
They choose to run, each holding 
their own conviction in their hearts.
88.30191:
"And thus, having become everyone's favorite 
trainee, she became known as the greatest 
there was, her tale passed down for all time. 
And the world was happy ever after… 
Thank you for watching Royce's Masterpiece Theatre♪" 
 
"—— Except, it's too early for that! 
Come on, follow me, Earth! We're starting the second 
chapter; the Beloved Pre-Eminent Trainee arc!" 
 
[Trumpet Fanfare] 
 
"Right behind you, signorina! 
Leave her entrance scene's performance to me!" 
 
[Uptempo piece] 
"Here I go, Royce! 
♪ I'll embody the path she walks with a waltz. 
UNO DUE TRE!" 
 
"♪ But her aim is to be number one! 
That's right! She wants to be the best!" 
 
"♪ This is the dance part!" 
 
"♪ Who'll step up～ to be the next～ heroine～～" 
 
"This is my main part coming up! Sig.na Royce, 
I'm counting on your appassionato accompaniment!" 
 
"H-Hang on now! I don't remember accepting this!?" 
 
[Vigorous maraca sounds] 
 
"Whoo! Haa!" 
 
[Piano sounds] 
[Accordion sounds] 
 
"I'm not done yet!" 
 
[Toy violin sounds] 
[Sounds of Earth humming] 
 
"Whoa, I can't find anywhere to join in…!?" 
 
"Hahah, shed your fear, signorina. 
I only wish to form an unforgettable 
ensemble with you!" 
"So come, listen to your soul and play your sound!" 
 
"…… Oh, how entertaining……! 
You've asked for it now! 
There's no way I'm letting you alone stand out!" 
 
[Crazy maraca and güiro sounds]
88.30193:
Amongst all the bright talent in a generation who 
light up the turf, there are those wanderers who look 
despondently upon these twinkling lights. 
How much pain and hardship hides behind the 
congratulatory applause for the winners? 
Their dust-covered backs do not provide 
an answer, no way to understand. 
However… 
 
A pair of eyes watches out from under a cap pulled low. 
In them, a flame quietly flickers. In anger, in frustration. 
On the grand stage, heading to take on the world, her tiny 
blue mantle flutters in the wind. 
 
The sight of her running, as if to leave behind all her 
woes and overturn every single hope and expectation… 
it called to mind that one trainee who triumphed over 
the world in the past. 
 
—— Indeed, it's a near certainty that 
she will cross those great blue waters. 
And as if taking flight to the world beyond, 
leave the goalposts in her own marine blue.
88.30194:
Pursuing their own path they made it this far. 
 
The Woman of Steel, as like steel her will 
and body were, who concluded countless 
races entirely unharmed. 
 
The fair lady who faced her responsibilities under 
her noble bloodline, and found her own path 
at their end. 
 
The beast bordering on "Monster", who strung together 
six consecutive graded victories, unfaltering and unfazed 
by any opponent. 
 
The Empress, who, treading in the queen's footsteps, 
not only lit up the path to the tiara, but seized victory at 
the Autumn Tenno Sho. 
 
The Magical Girl, who bluntly proclaimed that 
a trainee's strength is unrelated to any set path 
as she personally went about proving just that. 
 
They were dazzling and glorious, and endlessly fast. 
It is their honored footsteps I followed to make it 
as far as I have. 
 
And now, it is my time to be up there. 
I'm sure I can do it. 
All of my feelings will let me reach that tiara…!
88.30195:
The lesson room at night. 
White wings flutter in a dance. 
A dance dedicated to someone. 
 
A step, each one more refined than the last. 
A step, each one beautiful beyond this world. 
A step, further and further away. 
A step, exceeding all bounds. 
 
Wings, enchanting and pristine as glass. 
Spread as if to take off towards distant skie— 
 
[CLUNK] 
 
"—— !!" 
 
"Ah…… I'm sorry. Right, it's late. 
I'll tidy up straight away." 
 
In a moment, the academy will lock for the night. 
Her apologetic expression and tender smile 
betrays a certain youthful naivety. 
In that, for some reason, I find immense peace of mind.
88.30196:
We were born on the same earth 
We live under the same sky 
We desire to run on the same turf 
You and I 
Though they may abate soon, 
our fates are undeniably connected 
 
You, like a spring breeze 
May you remain in its warmth 
You, like a gentle breath of air 
May you swirl through my skies forever 
 
My dear contemporary 
Our precious days 
I cherish 
Your happiness
88.30197:
Gripping our "date's" hand, we stand in the center. 
An impassioned energy rides the music reaching our ears. 
Our hearts beat to an intense rhythm. 
Every pair on this dance floor are our rivals. 
Yet, my biggest rival is right beside me —— 
 
"Will you keep up with me, Oguri!? 
Step, step… and step, into a turn!!" 
 
"—— !! I expected nothing less… 
but I can do that too…!" 
 
"Woaaah!! Heheh, impressive. 
I won't go down easy though!" 
 
We're not concerned with the lead and follow. 
That's nothing for the two of us. 
Our focus is only the lead, leaving us without 
a moment to breathe in its contention. 
 
This stinging sensation feels great. 
Much like the fervor of competition in a race, 
this all out battle between us… these moments 
where we face each other with all our heart… 
are irreplaceably special to me.
88.30264:
"I'm back～"

I wondered why,
why it seemed like that was the right thing to say.

I think I was seeking this radiance.
To finally reach that place.

"And then after that——I'll depart once more."

Every time I reached my destination, I realized something.
That this place… was just a stopover.

I can't decide when it'll end.
Because, as long as these legs are willing,
I'll continue my journeys.

"Well then, I wonder where I'll go to tomorrow."
88.30265:
Whenever I think I'm "missing something",
I deny that thought fiercely.

It's not as though it was missing 
It was simply not necessary from the beginning.

Ice that is impure, is brittle.
That's why I sharpened it, made it "transparently" clear,
So that no matter how much heat it takes, it'll withstand it.

I do not need meaningless connections.
(——Don't… melt me.)

Having a connection to that place is worthless.
(Don't touch me. Don't come near me——)

Therefore… look.
With this, do you now understand?
To become strong, something like "love" isn't necessary.

After all, there is a realm that is only accessible
to those that impose solitarily on themselves.
88.30268:
Arrays of spotlights burn through the darkness,
bathing the theater in a dazzling brilliance.

As I step onto the stage, and into their glow,
a faint heat creeps into my cheeks.
Yet my royal azure dress remains still as 
the windless sea, my heart calm as its depths. 

I cast my gaze out in front of the stage, and see you 
watching over me from the VIP seats. My lord. 

Calmly, I take a breath and begin my song. 
Its melody carries across the stage, and I feel 
the silent tension in the audience begin to wane.

Off to a good start… All's well.
Relieved, my voice soars clear and strong.
Somehow, I feel in fine form today.

I steal a glance toward the VIP seats.
…My lord.
With this song, I pledge my loyalty to you.

So please, watch me.
How I sing for you, this melody…
Keep them in your memories.

My lord… I am shining so brightly.
On this grand stage, with all eyes on me…
I am dedicating this song to you!

…You understand, don't you, my lord? 
Now, please, applaud your songstress!  Let me hear your voices! 

Whichever your form of expression, I await!
A standing ovation, an encore! 

The finale draws near!
My lord! On this eve, I am a splendid songstress!
I have— Whoa!?


"Durandal! You're lagging. Snap out of your daydreams!"
88.30289:
A battle to determine the world's strongest dirt Umamusume.
That prestigious, traditional race was, at the same time,
an insurmountable wall standing tall before Japan.

Though many have reached out toward the pinnacle they yearned for,
their dreams were repeatedly swallowed by the swirling dust.

Even so, the will never perished.
A history built on relentless effort and bitter setbacks
now pushes the challenger's back forward.

"Last year's loss is an asset. Our knowledge is more than enough.
All that's left is to win! That's all there is to it, right?!"

Believing in the accumulated history of the Umamusumes.
Driven by their own will to avenge the regrets of a narrow defeat.

Turning everything into fuel, the challenger dashes forward.
Kicking up the sand, aiming solely for the summit.

And then, leaving the people's expectations
and the hot-pursuing rivals behind,
they grasped the hand of the Goddess of Victory.

Those who witnessed this turning point in history
shared the overwhelming excitement.

Those who had kept wishing for this moment
trembled with the joy of an unprecedented feat.

Fading away nevermore, to be passed down through generations—
the name of the protagonist of this drama is
Forever Young.

119.3:
Link Hands & Shine Bright 
—Our Grand Concerts—
119.5:
The Grand Masters
～A tale of legacy～
119.6:
Reach For the Stars
Project l'Arc
119.8:
Harvest! Feast!
The Great Food Festival
119.11:
Welcome to the Wilds
—DESIGN YOUR ISLAND—

120.1: The petite and eccentric Director Akikawa has declared the establishment of a new tournament, the <color=#FF6D26>URA Finale</color>!\nTrainers and trainees will have to work as one if they want to be crowned the inaugural URA champions!
120.2: The petite and eccentric Director Akikawa has declared the establishment of a new tournament, the <color=#FF6D26>URA Finale</color>!\nTrainers and trainees will have to work as one if they want to be crowned the inaugural URA champions!
120.3:
Why do trainees sing? A producer appears with a project — the <color=#FF6D26>Grand Live</color>. Trainees face their concerts from a different perspective, and find their 
own answers!
120.4: The media has established a new contest to determine the best runner of them all: the <color=#FF6D26>Twinkle Star Climax</color>. Follow your dreams—you never know what track they'll take you down!
120.5:
$(scale 90)A support AI carrying the names of the 3 goddesses is the newest development to confront trainers in their quest to support
their trainees with all they have. Through the wisdom imparted this way, they aim to reach new heights in the <color=#FF6D26>Grand Masters</color>.
120.6: $(scale 95)Prix de l'Arc de Triomphe, the peak of international racing. Those who seek their victory at the top of the world every year. <color=#FF6D26>Project l'Arc</color>, newly established at Tracen Academy. The curtain rises on a wistful journey of chasing dreams.
120.7:
$(scale 95)The <color=#FF6D26>H.A.F.</color> is a multi-sport competition to crown the number 1 trainee athlete, and it begins now! Trainees drenched in sweat test their limits in 15 sports disciplines! 
Witness their shared athletic spirit!
120.8: $(scale 95)Director Akikawa's announcement pushes Tracen Academy into a farming boom! The sun beckons all to the fields until the moon gathers everyone together at the dining table. It's time for another day of hard work!
120.9: $(scale 95)A mechanical trainee appears at Tracen Academy. She is the brainchild of genius inventor Sugar Lights. Many issues remain in this early model… so help enhance her and make the inventor's dream come true!
120.10: When the Twinkle Series faces bad times, a few legendary trainees step up! Unifying all involved in racing, they seek to push the Twinkle Series back to its heights… and into a new era!
120.11: $(scale 95)The Uninhabited Island Project was the result of taking a chance on Tucker Bryne's dream, passionate trainees, and giving in to instincts! Train body and mind out in the wilds, and build the greatest training site ever!
120.12: $(scale 95)The trainees' busy lives are interrupted by an invitation to a soothing experience at the <color=#FF6D26>Yukoma hot spring village</color>. But the village has fallen on hard times…!? Rest and peaceful relaxation are important to well-being!
120.13: $(scale 95)The Breeders' Cup. Having once challenged this most massive of G1s on the world stage, Casino Drive seeks victory there with a new campaign. A trial of truly global proportions begins, each trainee holding her own desires!

128.1001: A high-energy song perfect for the URA Finals. Let me hear you shout! Umapyoi! ♪ Umapyoi! ♪
128.1004: Our rivalry is what brought us together... And now there's no stopping us! Never looking back!
128.1005: A song only those who wear the Triple Tiara can sing. A flowery song filled with determination.
128.1006: The first song sung by Umamusume after their debut. Echo forth! Fanfare!
128.1007: A refreshing song sung by rising stars in their junior year. The racers' dreams sparkle brilliantly.
128.1008: Only those who keep their eyes on the prize will reach the NEXT FRONTIER. The crown awaits...
128.1009: A powerful song for those who power through and win the day. Not even a raging storm will stop them.
128.1010: As if flowers will bloom from this very tune, this music captures the beautiful moment of a G1 triumph. Chase your dreams, and they will come true!
128.1012: Whether we're racing or just running for the fun of it, we give the track everything we've got! We gathered up all the unique dreams we have, and put them into this song, so let's go! Starting gate!
128.1023: Sometimes we fight, and we don't know how to make up. But deep down, we'd rather be smiling together. No matter how blue or bitter we feel, that's just part of being friends—and this song is a reminder of that!
128.1025: A song where the brightest star can shine, one of bravery and hope. An exciting new feeling... A signal of new beginnings.
128.1026: A song filled with a fleeting yet strong will. With a wish in her heart, she makes a plea to the moon.
128.1027: They vowed to be the fastest! The racers, running beyond their limits, follow their instincts and shout!
128.1028: A song those who wear the Classic Triple Crown can sing. Performing this is every racer's dream.
128.1030: Watching you encourages me to race on to victory! An energetic song about enjoying every moment!
128.1031: An intense song about the storm of emotions that captivates racers. It's impossible not to give in.
128.1032: A refreshing song performed with a rival. Placing your dreams in another, a new story begins...
128.1033:
A song filled with hopes for everyone's futures to shine brighter than the stars sparkling in the night sky!
You, too, can find the lights of your dreams!
128.1034: The life of a racer is full of ups and downs, smiles and frowns... so we squeezed all the big, wacky adventures of Tracen life into one itty-bitty song! ♪
128.1035: Now that I know I never was alone... A song that celebrates the smiles and tears born of friendship.
128.1037: What lies beyond the goal? What unique scenery is there to see there? This song blends wonder and warmth, gently encouraging you to keep on running.
128.1040: This song shines with all that makes youth so dazzling—friendship, rivalry, tears, smiles, doubt, and hope.
128.1042: This song is about the dreams we have, and the resolve it takes to keep running toward them. It's about moving forward, even when you're lost or scared. If you ever lose your way, we're here to tell you, "Go this way."
128.1043: This one's the story of two Umamusume. Out in the freezing rain, they huddled together and made a promise—"It's not over yet—we still can shine, if our dreams are on the line and you're by my side..."
128.1044: Don't stop till you're a top Umadol! All you need to sing this song are a mic, a splash of cuteness, and an infectious smile! ☆
128.1048: We all start in the same gates. The path opens to any who would run it—so go! Surge ahead, with the tailwind urging you on!
128.1049: Bakushin! Bakushiiin! BAKUSHIIIIIIN! This song was written by Bakushin for Bakushin, and I hope it will inspire some BAKUSHIIIN in you too!\n—Comment from Class Representative
128.1050: Our first anniversary... We really poured all our gratitude into this song. It's about reaching our dreams, and finding new inspirations beyond them. We'll keep running with you, further and further!
128.1051: Dreams come to those who run on! An ode to the radiance of youth and all the tears and smiles it brings.
128.1055: Look! Is it a ship?! Is it a UFO?! No, it's Golshi! Peace, peace! ♪ How'd you like that? No one's safe from the Golshi takeover! ☆
128.1056: A stately choral piece befitting of the prestigious Mejiro family. The glory of the Mejiro name knows no bounds—not now, not ever.
128.1154: You've set foot in the bountiful wilderness of Tracen Island! What you'll find here is nature, this song, and… gleaming muscles!
128.8501: BGM for the StarHorse TV news program. If you hear this song start playing, it's time to find out what's new with StarHorse4!
128.8502: You can't have a StarHorse allowance race without this fusion tune. An homage to the evolution of the series.
128.8503: If this song plays during your debut, you know you're in for a show! Getting this song to play is a goal for any StarHorse4 player.
128.8504: BGM that plays during breeding in StarHorse4. Craft your ideal pedigree at your leisure with this relaxed tune.
128.8505: BGM that plays during breeding in StarHorse4. The music seems to grow along with your horse and pairs well with the cutscenes.

130.262: The Understated Quality of Resolute Perseverance

131.1: Run in Rainy weather at least 4 times and win 3 times
131.2: Run in Cloudy weather at least 4 times and win 3 times
131.3: Run in Snowy weather at least 3 times and win 2 times
131.4: Achieve Career rank C or higher having run in at least 1 G1 race but never winning any
131.6: Complete a Career playthrough having run in at least 10 races, all on dirt
131.7: Complete a Career playthrough having run in at least 10 races, all on turf
131.8: Win a race after becoming Rushed 3 times
131.9: Win a G1 after receiving Inspiration from two Legacies with no career graded race wins
131.10: Win 6 G1 or G2 races by at least 3 lengths as a Front Runner or Pace Chaser
131.12: Win 2 of the Kyoto Kimpai, Nakayama Kimpai, and Kinko Sho
131.17: Win a race after losing 5 or more times in a row
131.18: Win a Make Debut by at least 7 lengths
131.19: Win a Make Debut without training a single time
131.20: Complete a Career playthrough after running in at least 10 races and never failing a Training
131.21: Win 6 times as Front Runner and attain Speed of 600 or higher
131.22: Win a G1 as Late Surger or End Closer and attain Power and Guts of 500 or higher
131.23: Win a graded race at each of the 10 central racecourses
131.26: Win 2 of the Satsuki Sho, Japanese Derby, and Kikuka Sho
131.27: Win 2 of the Oka Sho, Japanese Oaks, and Shuka Sho
131.28: Win the Osaka Hai, Tenno Sho (Spring), and Takarazuka Kinen
131.29: Win the Tenno Sho (Autumn), Japan Cup, and Arima Kinen
131.30: Win the Tenno Sho (Spring) and Tenno Sho (Autumn)
131.34: Win 5 graded races in a row without ever losing at the OP level or below
131.35: Win your first G1 in senior year
131.39: Attain Speed of 800 or higher and run in at least 15 turf races
131.40: Win a G1 without having won a graded race before
131.41: Win at least 1 G1 on both turf and dirt
131.42: Complete a Career playthrough after running in at least 10 races and placing top 3 in all of them
131.43: Receive Inspiration from a Legacy Umamusume with a career win in the Japanese Oaks,\nwin the Japanese Oaks and Tenno Sho (Autumn),\nand obtain at least 320,000 fans
131.44: Win the Hanshin J.F., run in all races with a Great mood, and complete the Career playthrough with all training levels at 3 or higher, and without Slow Metabolism, Skin Breakout, or Slacker
131.45: Run in at least 23 graded races, win the Kikuka Sho and Tenno Sho (Spring) as 2nd favorite or higher, and complete the playthrough with at least 320,000 fans
131.46: Win the Japanese Derby and Tenno Sho (Autumn) as a Late Surger and complete the playthrough with the Fast Learner condition
131.47: Win the Yayoi Sho, Satsuki Sho, Japanese Derby, and Kikuka Sho as favorite,\nwin the Arima Kinen (Classic Year), and obtain at least 240,000 fans
131.48: Receive Inspiration from a Legacy Umamusume with Career rank S or higher,\nwin the Hopeful Stakes, Yayoi Sho, and Satsuki Sho while undefeated,\nand attain at least 1,200 Speed
131.50: Win the Takamatsunomiya Kinen, Sprinters Stakes, Yasuda Kinen, and Mile Championship
131.51: Win 5 races, including 3 G1 races, while undefeated
131.52: Win the Satsuki Sho, Japanese Derby, and Kikuka Sho
131.54: Complete a Career playthrough with a win rate of 85% or higher, 7 G1 wins, and at least 320,000 fans
131.55: Win 7 G1 races in a row
131.56: Win a G1 with an Awful Mood
131.57: Win at least 7 graded races of 1,400 meters or less and attain Speed and Power of 1,200 or higher
131.58: Win at least 7 graded races of 2,400 meters or more and\nattain at least 1,200 Stamina
