163.1001: My name's Special Week! My dream is to be the top Umamusume in all of Japan! I gotta work hard to make my moms proud!
163.1002:
Search
I'm Silence Suzuka. I love to run, and I won't give up my lead to anyone. Uh... that's about it.
Type your translation here...
163.1003: Hey hey! It's Tokai Teio! You might wanna keep an eye on me! Because there's gonna be a new undefeated Triple Crown champion in town!
163.1004: Hiii! Maruzensky here! You came here to see me, right? My running's out of this world! Hehe! Try not to fall in love too hard, okay? ♪
163.1005: It's everyone's favorite jet-black entertainer, Fuji Kiseki! I'm a modern miracle! I put smiles on faces wherever I go, you know? ♪
163.1006: I'm Oguri Cap. I'll do my best to win for the folks back home. Thanks for your support.
163.1007: Bow down! Gold Ship has arrived! Whether I gotta go through a raging inferno, the most downtrodden turf, or even way out there in outer space, I'm always up for adventure! ☆
163.1008: Yo! Vodka here! Listen up. My policy is to be the coolest at all times! I don't act all lame. Got that?
163.1009: Hello! Daiwa Scarlet here! I'll try my best to... What am I saying? "Trying" won't cut it. I will be number one!
163.1010: Howdy! Taiki Shuttle here! I'm aimin' to put smiles on some faces with some hard runnin'!
163.1011: My name is Grass Wonder. I was born an Umamusume, so I will take this path as far as I possibly can. Hee hee. ♪
163.1012: I see a buncha Umamusume here looking like they wanna take me on! Well, Hishiama will give you all you can handle! Come at me! One-on-one!
163.1013: I am Mejiro McQueen. I shall surely fulfill my family's ambition to claim the Tenno Sho crown.
163.1014: A mighty crimson bird swoops onto the track! It's the one, the only! El Condor Pasaaa, the strongest Umamusume in the wooorld!
163.1015: Muahahaha! Feast your eyes upon your beautiful and powerful Overlord, T.M. Opera O! My legend... begins now!
163.1016: I'm Narita Brian. I'm here to run circles around my opponents, not chit-chat. That's it.
163.1017: I am Symboli Rudolf. I hold the honor of being the "Emperor" who seeks to help all Umamusume reach their true potential. Together, let us forge a path to honor and glory!
163.1018: I am Air Groove. If you are unwavering in your beliefs, your ideals will blossom. It is my role as Empress to lead by example.
163.1019: Hi hi! I'm Digitan! I'm here to support all these sparkling Umamusume! Every day here is a good day! Especially for an Uma Otaku!
163.1020: Hello. I'm Seiun Sky. I'm just taking things as they come. Good things come to those who wait, you know?
163.1021: I'm Tamamo Cross! I'm gonna race my butt off and make a name for myself! I may not look like much, but ya don't wanna mess with me!
163.1022: Pleased to meet you. I'm Fine Motion. I look forward to making lots of memories here. Would you happen to know of a good local ramen spot?
163.1023: I'm Biwa Hayahide. My goal is to devise the perfect winning equation... I'd also like to point out that my head is of completely average size!
163.1024: I'm Maya, heh heh! ☆ I love all things exciting! The thrill of adrenaline's the best! ♪ Nice to meet ya!
163.1025: I'm Manhattan Cafe. I have... a friend I want to catch up with... She's always running ahead of me... You see, right there...
163.1026: My name is Mihono Bourbon. My objective is to win the Triple Crown. Please refer to my specs for information regarding my capabilities.
163.1027: Sup! Mejiro Ryan here! I'm real big into fitness and lifting. It's all 'bout keeping yourself swole! See you at the gym!
163.1028: Buono, buono! ♪ Hishi Akebono here! ☆ Whether it's cooking or racing, I put a little bit of love into everything I do!
163.1029: My name's, uh, Yukino Bijin! My dream's to run in the Twinkly Series and shine like a real city girl! Whew... I think I managed t' say it all without mess'n up...
163.1030: I'm Rice Shower... To be honest, all I ever do is cause bad things to happen, and... I'm really just no good... B-but I'm trying to be better!
163.1031: Hello-lo! I'm Ines Fujin! I'm here to work hard and race harder to make my family proud!
163.1032: I'm Agnes Tachyon. You wouldn't be interested in finding out just how fast an Umamusume can run, would you? I just so happen to be looking for a guinea pig...
163.1033: My name is Admire Vega... Now, may I please go? I have to train more—win more. So I can be the brightest star.
163.1034: Watch it, you're talkin' to Inari One! As I'm sure ya can see, I'm an Edo gal through and through—and I'm gonna be the biggest racer in the scene!
163.1035: Hey, hey! My dream's always been to become a Derby Champion! OH, RIGHT! MY NAME! I'm Winning Ticket! Keep your eyes on me!
163.1036: The name's Air Shakur. The data always tells the true story, and I've got my simulations on point. Hope everyone's ready to get crushed by my logic.
163.1037: My name is Eishin Flash. I run to preserve Umamusume tradition. I always run right on schedule.
163.1038: Here comes Curren Chan, ready to make the whooole world a cuter place! ☆ Curren's the only girl you need to keep your eyes on! Okay? ♪
163.1039: Ohoho! I am Kawakami Princess. That's right! A princess among princesses. I'm here to smash my opponents into the dirt. Gracefully, of course!
163.1040: The name's Gold City. You better not think I'm just another pretty face. I'll let my running do my talking for me.
163.1041: Hello! I'm Sakura Bakushin O! As you can tell, I'm the model class representative AND Umamusume! BAKUSHIIIN!
163.1042: Hohoho! Seeking the Pearl here! You know the world's your oyster, don't you? I'm here to prove it!
163.1043: Grawr! I'm Shinko Windy! Did I scare ya? Aw, come on! Admit it! Hey! I'm talking to you! Chomp!
163.1044: Sweep Tosho is just an alias! My true identity is Magical Girl Sweepy! Don't make me cast a spell on you! Hey! Thunk!
163.1045: Hehe. ♪ I'm Super Creek. I'll work hard to make everyone around me smile. Just leave it to me. ♪
163.1046: My name's Smart Falcon, but you can call me Falco! My dream is to become an Umadol! Just let me know if you want my autograph! ☆
163.1047: My name is Zenno Rob Roy. It's a little embarrassing, but I love fantasy novels, and... well, someday I hope to write my own legend through racing!
163.1048: Name's Tosen Jordan. My dream is... you know, intros aren't really my thing, so let's skip it. Nice to meecha. ☆ Anyway, check out my nails! Nice, huh?
163.1049: The name's Nakayama Festa. I need a lot more than a lukewarm race to thrill me, get it? It's gotta be something hotter—hot enough to burn!
163.1050: The name's Narita Taishin. I'm in this to make all the people who doubted me look stupid. Now leave me alone.
163.1051: Hello. My name is Nishino Flower. My dream is to become the kind of Umamusume that everyone can depend on!
163.1052: I'm Haru Urara! I like carrots! Oh, and running too! ♪ I'm always working my hardest to take first place!
163.1053: Hey, sup! I'm Bamboo Memory. I'm just as tough running the race track as I am running the disciplinary committee, so watch out!
163.1054: Never fear! Biko Pegasus, defender of justice, is here! I leave my enemies in the dust with my blazing speed! I'm the true people's champion, putting a smile on every person's face!
163.1055: Hey, hey! It's Marvelous Sunday! I hope you'll join me on my mission to make the world just a little more marvelous wherever I go!
163.1056: Greetings! They call me Matikanefukukitaru! My unwavering faith in the great Shiraoki will bring abundant blessings into our lives. Available for divination day and night!
163.1057: There's a wind you'll only find while racing. It's a gentle tailwind, calm and true to itself. By the way, the name's Mr. C.B.—it's a pleasure.
163.1058: Hi! I-I'm Meisho Doto. I, uh... I... I hope someday I can have the confidence to... Uh... I e-endeavor to... Oh, d-dang, I keep tripping up...
163.1059: Yes, hello. I'm Mejiro Dober. I... plan to race in a way worthy of the Mejiro name.
163.1060: Hey. I'm Nice Nature. Haha, truth is, I don't really live up to people's expectations of me, but... that's cool too, you know? I prefer to take it easy.
163.1061: Ohoho! My name is King Halo. As a first-rate competitor, you can naturally expect great things from me. Rest assured, King Halo will be a household name soon enough.
163.1062: Hi, hi, Matikanetannhauser here. I need to train as hard as I can to make sure I don't lose... Huh? Wait, there's no training today?!
163.1063: Well met. I am Ikuno Dictus. Allow me to meet all of your management needs with my iron will.
163.1064: I'm Mejiro Palmer! How ya doing? I'm always around if you need me, so don't be shy! ♪
163.1065: Wahey! Daitaku Helios in the hooouse! My running will have you vibing in no time! Now let me hear you shout! ☆
163.1066: Twin Turbo here about to take first place! Let's go! Turbo booost!
163.1067: My name is Satono Diamond. There's no such thing as fate. I intend to race my way into a bright shining future of my own making!
163.1068: I'm Kitasan Black. I always do my best to create a festive atmosphere that everyone can enjoy when I race!
163.1069: I-I'm Sakura Chiyono O! My dream is to stand on the same stage as my hero! And I will make my dreams blossom!
163.1070: I'm Sirius Symboli. You can shut up and save the pretentious lectures for someone else. Now kick back and watch me prove that I'm on top of the world.
163.1071: A pleasure. I'm Mejiro Ardan. My legs may be fragile, but I want to shine brightly on the track, even if only for a moment.
163.1072: I am Yaeno Muteki. As a student of the Kongo Yaegaki style, I am always in search of honorable opponents with whom to race. Let us fight fair and square!
163.1073: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi here! I've always dreamed of winning the Triple Crown, and now I'm going all out to—cough, cough! I-I'm all right, just choked on air. Really, never felt better!
163.1074: ...Oh? Are we doing self-introductions? Ehehe, well, my name is Mejiro Bright. I'll do my best to uphold the Mejiro name.
163.1076:

world. The Prix de l'Arc de

163.1077: Hi, I'm Narita Top Road! I'm so thankful to all the people rooting for me. I'll do everything I can to make them proud!
163.1078:
……My name is Yamanin Zephyr. My

be like the wind that runs faster 
and freer than anything else!
163.1079: I'm Furioso. No, I don't come from Chuo. I made a special transfer from Funabashi and I'm not afraid to show you what we're made of.
163.1080: Nice to meetcha, Tray-chan♪ Let's look for exciting, thrilling things together!
163.1081: This here gal's Espoir City! Keep them races comin'! I'll leave 'em in the… dust…? Hey, hands off! I didn't ask ya to pat my head!
163.1082: North Flight here! My outfits, make-up, accessories and above all, huge effort are what makes me shine! So please watch me!
163.1083:
I'm Symboli Kris S. I am indebted 
to the Symboli family. As one of 
them, I will carry out both the 
objectives I have set, and the 
"mission" I have been assigned.
163.1084:
I am Tanino Gimlet! What I seek is 
the ideal "me". I have no intention 
of deceiving my temporary self. 
Destroy it, kick it down, and 
progress to the end!
163.1085:
My name is Daiichi Ruby. To be 
supreme is the duty of my family. I 
will strive to fulfill my duty.
163.1086: You want to get to know me? Then come to the turf by all means. There you'll learn everything about me… Mejiro Ramonu.
163.1087:
I'm Machan. Aston Machan. I will 
eventually become the world's 
mascot. Keep looking straight at me 
with those eyes.
163.1088: I'm Satono Crown! I will bring pride to the Satono Group. I'll give it my all. I will find strength in adversity! Just you wait!
163.1089: I'm… Cheval Grand… I know I'm nothing… special… But one day… I'll achieve greatne— N-No, I'll try my hardest!
163.1090: I am Verxina. I won't give up until I break down everything in my path to become a queen.
163.1091: I'm Vivlos! One day I'll be a celebrity, racing in sparklign Dubai!♪ And you're coming with me, no ifs or buts!♪
163.1092: I'm Dantsu Flame. Hey, no fighting okay? I work hardest after eating something sweet, I guess?
163.1093: …I am K.S. Miracle. I will repay everyone who gave me this life… I will make miracles happen.
163.1094: Jungle Pocket's the name. I'll be your partner, as long as you wanna run! But don't think you'll be taking my title of "the strongest"!
163.1096: Nyahaha! No Reason's the name, and world domination is my game! Let's get this coup started!
163.1097: My name is Still in Love. I… I'm not worthy of any more introduction… I like to… keep those things to myself…
163.1098:
Rickey ☆ Lucky ☆ Auspicious ☆ 
Copano Rickey! The power of Feng

163.1099: I'm Hokko Tarumae, I came here from a port town in the north like a paper crane. The Loco-dol of Tomakomai♪ …Hmm, maybe I could come up with something more clever.

learner, but I'm a hard worker.

163.1102: Behold, my lovely musciciste! Join me, Sounds of Earth, to create a wonderful melodia together!
163.1103: I have but one goal: to be the Strongest! I want my name to go down in history, and to do that I'll paint myself in the best light!
163.1104: Nice to meetcha! I'm Katsuragi Ace. Don't be afraid to dream, okay? I'll break down any walls that stand in your way!
163.1105: Neo Universe would like to propose a friendly "contact". In other words— "Nice to meet you".
163.1106: I'm Hishi Miracle. I'm doing my best while keeping the vibes good. I hope you'll do the same, okay?
163.1107: Come, friends, and join me on a journey where excitement and dance awaits! Everyone who wants to dream, climb aboard this vessel with me!
163.1108:
…… Name's Duramente.

163.1109: I'm Rhein Kraft! To make dreams come true, to break open paths, to connect with the future. That's the kind of trainee I want to be!
163.1110: I desire to solidify my future through coronation with the tiara. Oh, and nice to meet you!
163.1111: Air Messiah. I want to be strong and graceful, like my mother was. I will prove the greatness and value of the future.
163.1114: I'm Buena Vista! I want to fulfil my promise. To reach that beautiful scenery.
163.1115: You'd better show your respect by kneeling before me, the great Orfevre, and respect my reign.
163.1116: Logic and reason? Pure nonsense. Winning is the only thing that matters, no? I won't let anything get in my way to do so.
163.1117: I'm Win Variation. My only goal is to become the leader… the Principal! No matter how tough my opponents may be, I refuse to give up!
163.1119: I, Dream Journey am there for you if you're looking to go on an expedition beyond your dreams. I can feel it in you.
163.1120: Calstone Light O. My dream is to break all speed records. My favorite thing… Straight lines. That's it. Even my introduction goes by in a flash.
163.1121: My holy sword shall release a blazing light, which shall free you from the darkness that devours you. My name is Durandal. I vow to be your loyal knight!
163.1124: I declare: "As shock troop commander, I will conceive the cyclone of the Big Four!" Let's expand our dream together!
163.1128: It's me, Blast Onepiece! Humans are so friendly to me. I love them super duper much! I wanna get closer to them and get to know them even better!
163.1129: I'm Almond Eye. I will win, even if my opponent's a legend. That's what I believe in!
163.1130: My name's Lucky Lilac, nice to meetcha. I'll overcome any and all trials to become the star of the turf.
163.1131: Gran Alegria here! From 0.75 miles to 1.25 miles nothing can stop this here future Queen of Mile!
163.9001: Hello. I'm Tazuna Hayakawa, the Tracen Academy director's secretary. I'm here to ensure that everyone has the best on-campus experience possible. ♪
163.9002: I'm Yayoi Akikawa, the director of this academy! I do everything for my lovely students and trainers alike! I'm there for you if you need me!
163.9004: Hello. I'm Aoi Kiryuin, a new trainer here at Tracen Academy. I'm still learning as I go, but I'll do my absolute best!
163.9005: Sasami Anshinzawa, (apprentice of a) legendary acupuncturist, at your service! With one little poke, I'll have you ready to take on the world! Wow, right? No worries! ☆
163.9006: I'm Riko Kashimoto. It is the role of a trainer to look after the health of their Umamusume. Therefore, it's appropriate to have some level of anxiety regarding one's work.
163.9008:

the business of event planning. 
I will help all of you shine 
on stage… Please allow me to

163.9040: I'm Darley Arabian. Each trainee has her own personality, and each one is the main character— Let's raise them with care, my little lamb!
163.9041: My name is Godolphin Barb. What drives trainees forward are the bonds they have with others. I'll be there to help you out too.
163.9042: My name's Byerley Turk. What trainees need the most is strength. I'll train you to be strong enough to leave your mark on the earth.
163.9043: I'm Mei Satake! If you're looking for European race course analyses, I'm the gal to ask. Together, we'll make the dream of winning the Prix de l'Arc de Triomphe come true!
163.9044: My name is Ryoka Tsurugi. I spend my days producing all sorts of content. I strive to deliver the world's most engaging videos.
163.9046: I am Saint Light. As the first trainee to receive the Three Garlands, I shall entrust you with my knowledge and blessing.
163.9047: I'm Speed Symboli. I happen to know the endless possibilities that hide within you. Come, and we'll turn the world upside-down!
163.9048: Hi there! I'm Haiseiko! Give this predecessor, this "cutesy monster" a little taste of your heart～! *Chomp♪*

176.1001: Remain quiet and focused when eating corn!
176.1003: Have honey when feeling good! And honey when feeling bad!
176.1004: Has coffee-flavored milk after her morning shampoo
176.1006: Always says "thank you for the meal," even when alone
176.1011: All the pencils in her case must be perfectly sharpened
176.1013: Always wakes up to early morning tea
176.1014: Always checks the lyrics before singing at karaoke
176.1015: Always gifts the performers flower stands when going to see an opera
176.1017: Brings back souvenirs to the student council when she goes on a trip
176.1018: Not picky. Will eat the greatest creations and worst failures
176.1023: Always places her glasses in a safe spot just to her left at bedtime
176.1024: Always puts on lip gloss before entering her trainer's office
176.1026: Never forgets that some things can't be quantified
176.1030: Puts the wrap-around bands of picture books away for safekeeping
176.1037: Only buys what she's put on her shopping list
176.1040: Avoids salty foods the day before a photo shoot
176.1045: Never spoils others when it doesn't benefit them
176.1052: She's not gonna use a bath visor anymore!
176.1056: Always moves parallel to black cats so they can't cross her path, essentially partner running with them

177.1001: A selfie with mom (updated each time she goes home)
177.1003: A selfie with the Prez (changes depending on mood)
177.1006: A pic of her and her mother, from when she first learned how to set it
177.1011: Has the dates of her race goals in a large font
177.1013: Her lock screen is the Mejiro family crest, and her home screen is a secret
177.1014: A collection of inspirational quotes like "Winners never quit!"

177.1026: Unable to set due to crashing issues

177.1040: Right now it's a snapshot from camp

178.1001: Faces the direction of her hometown and quietly says "Here I go!"
178.1003: Bends and stretches with a focus on the knees
178.1004: Chats with her opponents as usual
178.1006: She thinks about the faces of all the people cheering for her
178.1011: Repeats the names of everyone in the race in her mind
178.1013: Checks her temperature. It's a childhood habit
178.1014: Throws her robe away and picks it up herself
178.1015: She looks at the expression of each and every spectator
178.1017: Everyone moves aside to let her pass
178.1018: Reapplies her eyeshadow and gets fired up
178.1023: She finds out everything she can about the other runners, even their favorite food
178.1024: Locks on to her trainer's seat in the stands ☆
178.1026: She measures the humidity, temperature, and wind direction using her eyes, ears, and skin
178.1030: She stretches for twice as long as the others
178.1037: She accurately keeps the time for the other runners
178.1045: She makes sure her trainer is in a safe place

184.1001: Hey, Trainer! We're at full TP! Just tell me what to work on!
184.1002: Excuse me... It looks like we're at full TP. Mind if I start warming up?
184.1003: Trainer! We're at full TP! Hasn't it been long enough? Let's train!
184.1004: Radical! ♪ Our TP has been fully recovered! Let's blow this popsicle stand and get training!
184.1005: Trainer, it looks like we're back at full TP. Let's see what miracles Kiseki can make happen today!
184.1006: It looks like we're back at full TP... Um... That's all... Talk to you soon.
184.1007: Peace peace! Special Golshi weather report! Tomorrow's weather is... heck if I know. Hey, did you know our TP is full?
184.1008: Yes! TP's all full! I'm always way better coming off a break. You've never seen anyone run as fast as me!
184.1009: Our TP is full again. I'll come up with some things to do on my own... but hurry back, okay?
184.1010: Trainer! Our TP is full! Hurry on back now, ya hear?
184.1011: Trainer, our TP has fully recovered. Could I ask for my next course of action?
184.1012: Yo, Teach! The TP tank is full! We gonna train? Hey! Wake up!
184.1013: It looks like our TP has fully recovered. I would very much like to get back to training.
184.1014: Trainer! Our TP's all full! Which means... time to dive right back into the ring!
184.1015: I hear our TP has been refilled. My adoring fans... They call for an encore! Let us fulfill their wish!
184.1016: TP has been recharged. That means no more waiting. Come on, we're training, aren't we?
184.1017: Our TP has fully recovered. Daily due diligence shall fuel our future. Let us return to training.
184.1018: TP has fully recovered. That concludes my report. Now... how do you wish to proceed?
184.1019: Your TP is fully charged, so let's get right to ogling Umamusume together!
184.1020: Oh? Our TP is full? Let's get back into things slooowly, okay?
184.1021: Hey! Your TP's full—if you don't do somethin' soon, it'll flood all of Tracen! ...JK, there's no rush, so you do you, yeah?
184.1022: It seems like your TP is all filled up. ♪ I'll wrap up my clover search, so let's get to training!
184.1023: Trainer, it looks like our TP is full. No rush, but I have a new theory I'd like to test... Would you help me out?
184.1024: Trainer! ☆ Our TP is full! Let's go on a date once we're done training, okay? ♪
184.1025: Your TP is full. And... if I were you... I'd watch your back.
184.1026: TP has been fully recovered. Please provide next instructions, Master.
184.1027: Our TP is full! What should we work on? Bench press? Squats? How 'bout some deadlifts?
184.1028: There's a full helping of TP with your name on it! Come on down and let's have a big, buono training session! ♪
184.1030: Um... Looks like our TP's full! I'm ready to train whenever, so, um... J-just letting you know!
184.1031: Heya, hey! Our TP's filled up! I'll go ahead and get ready for training!
184.1032: Well, well, looks like our TP is full. Shall we resume our experime—uh, training?
184.1033: RE: Your TP\nIt's full, so please contact me about our training schedule ASAP.
184.1034: Our TP's filled to the brim! C'mon, let's go wild!
184.1035: Trainer! Our TP's all full! And I'm full of energy! LET'S GOOO!
184.1036: Hey, our TP's full, you know. We need to be training at max efficiency.
184.1037: It appears our TP has fully recovered. Perhaps we should move to the next item on our schedule.
184.1038: Heeey! TP's all full up again! Feel free to come see your adorable Curren anytime! ♪
184.1039: Your TP is full—and you know what that means! It's time to knock out a lovely training session!
184.1040: TP is all full, and I'm already done warming up, sooo...
184.1041: TP restored to full Bakushin! So... uhhh... time to Bakushin some more!
184.1044: Our TP's full! Time for some magic practice! Hurry up, slowpoke!
184.1045: Our TP's full! You've been waiting, right? What a good trainer you are! ♪
184.1046: Trainer, our TP's all full! C'mon, train me or help me rehearse! ☆
184.1048: Hey, your TP is, like... full, I think? My polish is all dry now, so I'm ready whenever.
184.1050: Hey, your TP is full. Just thought I'd let you know.
184.1051: Um, it looks like our TP's full. I'm all ready to train!
184.1052: Yay! We've got sooo much TP! Umm... what does TP mean anyway?
184.1056: The great Shiraoki came to me in a dream and told me, "Your TP is full"! Could this be a sign?
184.1058: Our TP has been fully restored. If I train really hard... even I can change, right?
184.1059: Our TP's filled up. I, um... I'm all ready, so just let me know.
184.1060: Looks like our TP has recovered. Nice. I'm all rested up, so why don't we get back to it?
184.1061: TP has been fully restored. Now... have you figured out your training plan for raising a first-rate Umamusume?
184.1062: Trainer! Your TP is all filled up! Let's go, let's go! Ei, ei, mun!
184.1064: TP's full, we're good to go! Just waiting on you now!
184.1067: Our TP's all filled up! ♪ Come on, let's start training!
184.1068: Trainer! Your TP is full! I'll go ahead and set everything up for a training session!
184.1069: Your TP is in full bloom, Trainer! I can't wait to spend more time training together! ♪
184.1071: If I may say—your TP appears to be full. I'll conduct a thorough warm-up and await your arrival.
184.1072: Our TP has filled up! Come, let us train! To the track!
184.1074: Oh? We've got all our TP back. Let me know whenever you're ready!

185.1001: Our RP is full again! I need to get out there and race so I can be the best in all of Japan!
185.1002: Our RP has fully recovered. I kind of wanted to race, but... would that be okay?
185.1003: RP has been fully restored! ♪ Hehehe! I know you want to see the Invincible Teio race, right?
185.1004: Looks like our RP is all full! Ya wanna get goin'? Whether it's my car or on the racetrack, I'm rrrraring to go!
185.1005: Oh... It looks like our RP filled up while I was waiting. Hehe, then you better get ready for the show of a lifetime.
185.1006: Looks like our RP has filled up... Can you put me in a race? I really want to give you a win.
185.1007: 1 unread message from Her Majesty Queen Golshi. Subject: RP is full. Get your butt back here!
185.1008: Hey, Trainer! Our RP's full! Just let me know which race you want me to tear up!
185.1009: Trainer! Our RP is full again! And I swear... I WILL take first place in the next race!
185.1010: Well, lookie here! Our RP's all full! Trainer, hurry on back now! I've got a race to win! ♪
185.1011: It seems our RP has been fully restored. I've completed all race preparations. Just give me the word. ♪
185.1012: Yeah! The RP tank's all full! Heck yeah! Who wants to go one-on-one?!
185.1013: Our RP is back at maximum. Please... allow me to bring home a victory for the Mejiro clan.
185.1014: RP! MAX! Muy bien! This condor is ready to fly down the track!
185.1015: Our RP has been fully restored. But worry not. An Overlord never rushes into competition.
185.1016: Our RP is full. Put me in a race. Now.
185.1017: RP has been fully restored. As long as I have goals to accomplish, I will continue our journey to the top.
185.1018: Our RP has fully recovered. Have you given some thought to which race I should compete in?
185.1019: Aaaasdfjgkltrainerlook! Our RP is full! Let's go scope out the best angles to simp from!
185.1020: Our RP is close to bursting. Now leeet's seeee... which trick should we play next? ☆
185.1021: You're sittin' on max RP! Don't lettem go ta waste, yeah? I've got more energy'n I know what ta do with!
185.1022: It appears you've got max RP. ♪ Now then, would you mind escorting me to the race?
185.1023: It looks like our RP is full. What equation should we use in our next race? I can't wait to hear your opinion.
185.1024: Our RP's all full! Can I race? C'mon, can I? Hee hee, Maya's ready for lift off! ☆
185.1025: Your RP is full... And also, you, um... probably shouldn't open any windows until the shadows pass...
185.1026: Reporting in. RP has been fully restored. Competition possible. I await your orders.
185.1027: Looks like our RP is all full! When do I race? Don't forget to factor in warm-up time!
185.1028: Ooh, I'm stuffed! You've got max RP, so let's go run until we work my appetite back up!
185.1030: RP's full! I-I will also... d-do my b-burst! Ah... I messed up...
185.1031: Woohoo, RP's all filled up! Can't wait to get out there and run!
185.1032: RP has been fully restored... Looks like we can enter a race. Hmm. Which sample should I take?
185.1033: RE: Your RP\nIt's full. I'll be waiting at the track.
185.1034: Hey hey, our RP's all full! Time to show everyone what the great Inari can do!
185.1035: YES! Our RP is full! YEAH! IT'S. TIME. TO. RACE!
185.1036: Hey, our RP's maxed out. Gotta see if my race simulations are accurate.
185.1037: Our RP has been fully replenished. This is a good opportunity to apply what we've learned.
185.1039: YOU'VE got max RP, and I'VE got max princess power! Let's go crush some races! ♪
185.1040: What? Our RP is full already. What're you waiting for? Let me race, geez...
185.1041: Class representative here! RP has been fully restored! Now... praise me for my fine reporting skills!
185.1044: Our RP's full. What are you waiting for? I wanna test my race-winning spell!
185.1045: Oh, wow! Our RP is full again! I'm always ready to work hard for you! ♪
185.1046: Ta-dah! RP is all charged up! I'm sooo taking center stage in this next race! ☆ Woohoo! ♪
185.1048: Oh, hey. Your RP is all full. Guess I'll go ahead and like, get ready to run or whatever?
185.1050: Our RP is full. So? Are we racing or not?
185.1051: Our RP's filled up. I'll do my best to wow you with my performance!
185.1052: Did you hear? Our RP is full! Hooray! That means, um... I can race a whooole bunch!
185.1056: I heard our RP is full! My fortune tells me it's time to race, heh heh. ♪
185.1058: The RP tank is all full! Okay. I'm NOT going to trip until I make it to the race―gaaah!
185.1059: Your RP is fully recovered. Hurry and let me run... so I can get stronger...
185.1060: Oh, it looks like our RP is full up! I guess it's time for all the youngsters to start racing!
185.1061: Our RP is full! Now, time to claim a victory fit for a king!
185.1062: Ta-daaa! ♪ Your RP is all ready to rock 'n' race! Let's go, go, go!
185.1064: Our RP's maxed out. Time to kick some butt!
185.1067: Look how full our RP is! Won't you let me race? Please!
185.1068: It looks like your RP is full! Let's head to the racecourse and liven things up—just like a festival!
185.1069: Your RP is in full bloom! Can we enter a race? I want to show you how hard I've been training!
185.1071: Pardon me, but you seem to have reached maximum RP. Shall we go show everyone a race to remember?
185.1072: Our RP has filled up! Allow me to demonstrate the fruits of my labor on the track!
185.1074: We've fully recovered our RP. Shall we head out after we finish our tea?

<caption = ''>The story event "Beaches, Bathing Suits & Blazing Trails" will start on Oct 14 at 22:00 (UTC) !

During the event, you can train Umamusume to obtain Event Points and Prize Coins, which let you unlock story episodes, event-exclusive Support Cards, and more!

Event previews now come with voice lines!
Once the event reward collection period ends, preview voice recordings can be played by going to Story > Extras from the Home screen.</caption>

228.1: This song really gets me going! Getting to sing this song is like proof you're number one in Japan! So I've gotta try harder!
228.2: My mom loves this song! She said it's the one that made her cry the most when she saw me singin' it... Hehe.
228.3: Ooh, I like this song too!
228.4: Oh, I remember doing this song... It was giving me trouble, but Air Groove was kind enough to help out.
228.5: This song takes all the weight off my legs. I feel like I could just take off and run forever and ever...
228.6: This song... seems like it could be pretty good to run to.
228.7: This song always makes me feel much braver. ♪ It won't be easy getting to where I wanna go!
228.8: The legend of the invincible Teio goes on! You and I are never gonna stop runnin' for our dream. ♪
228.9: Hey, what song are you thinkin'? I'm in a good mood, so lemme show ya my special Teio step. ♪
228.10: Must be nice to have a rival always by your side... Just thinking about it gets my heart pumping. ☆
228.11: The chorus is totally rad! Singing it is like zooming down the road at top speed!
228.12: Look at all these hip tunes! I bet these would be totally fly at the disco too. ☆
228.13: An endless dream is what I hope to show my fans. And you as well, of course! Do look forward to it.
228.14: This takes me back to my beginnings... when I stepped off the stage and onto the turf.
228.15: Which song is your favorite? I'd love to know!
228.16: The dance solo gets my heart racing. I... don't mind this feeling.
228.17: If there comes a future day when I overcome all my limits... what then? I can't wait to find out.
228.18: Thinking about what song to pick made me hungry...
228.19: This song reminds me of that old saying: "Two times a winner, double the chicken dinners."
228.20: Even while we were recording this, Scarlet and Vodka were going at it. Luckily, I had my fishing net on hand.
228.21: Cue some bangers, 'cause it's time to play flounder othello!
228.22: No speed, no life! I'm gonna keep my engines firing, and you're coming along for the ride!
228.23: The chorus is so sick! You can really feel the "smoldering embers" of Brian's soul!
228.24: Hey, this thing has all the coolest songs. Wanna listen?
228.25: Winning is obviously important, but dancing alongside your rivals is, well... I don't hate it.
228.26: Don't read too much into the lyrics, you hear? It's not how I actually feel. Like, at all. Got it?!
228.27: All the songs here are worth a listen!
228.28: A mile seems long, but you can blink once and it'll all be over... Time flies on the track!
228.29: I was listenin' to this after school with my friends! First Urara started dancing, then Fukukitaru and Rice, and then we all rocked out together!
228.30: I can't help swayin' to the beat! Hey, Trainer, shall we dance?
228.31: Only a select few will ever reach that next frontier... Hehe. No path could be more rewarding, if you ask me.
228.32: We all have our own reasons for running, but ultimately our hopes all come down to one thing: winning.
228.33: Please, feel free to browse as long as you'd like. I think I'll get some tea ready. ♪
228.34: My fighting spirit doesn't die down after the race is over! Favorite, long shot, whoever—we'll duke it out on stage!
228.35: She's tough, all right. Eats anxiety for breakfast. Which makes beating her all the more worth it!
228.36: Teach, sing with me! I'm not taking no for an answer!
228.37: To take the desire to rise above and turn it into the strength to run... That is what this song means to me.
228.38: Gold Ship is really just nothing but trouble! ...Though I am grateful she helped me practice.
228.40: Instinct versus instinct, clashing on the course! Ring the bell, 'cause a battle royale is about to begin!
228.41: Whose legend? El's legend! Whether it's spring, summer, fall, or winter, El is the world's strongest!
228.42: The melody, the beat, the excitement! Let's enjoy this music together!
228.43: Down this perilous path I walk, toward my promised throne at the top! O, to possess such strength and beauty must be a sin!
228.44: On that fateful day when I performed this song, racing history—nay, the entire world lurched forward into a new dawn!
228.45: Even now I hear it... a chorus of praise for the overlord!
228.46: I don't need titles. I run to win... That'll never change.
228.47: No more doubts... Watch me. I'll show everyone who I am.
228.48: How long are you going to take? Hurry up and choose.
228.49: I'm rather fond of such displays of passion on stage as hoisting the microphone, stand and all. Heh, does that surprise you?
228.50: Music... muse sick? No. Hmm... Oh, don't mind me.
228.51: What? A smile is simply part of the performance, and an important one at that. Of course I'd have it down perfectly.
228.52: Take your time. It's a difficult choice, what with so many masterpieces.
228.53: No way. This song was literally made for all of us who just want to "witness" Uma greatness! Thank you, URA... I could cry...
228.54: Wait, is this... the gateway song that so many non-believers got Uma-pilled on? It's so peak!
228.55: Are you gonna play your oshi's song? I'm all ears!
228.56: No one likes a predictable race. It's all about telling destiny who's boss and shocking the crowd.
228.57: Ahh, a song of hopeful beginnings. Maybe I'll set out on a journey of my own... into the land of dreams.
228.58: Oh, you taking a break too? Well, kick back and put on some tunes.
228.59: A clash of destinies... I have no intention of ceding center stage, but I suspect neither of them do either.
228.60: I'll always be there to take your hand, so long as you offer it. That's what an older sister is for.
228.61: Now then, which song will you choose? I'm curious to see your tastes.
228.62: I love this song. ♪ The stage looks like a cake, and you get to make a heart with your hands—it's so cute!
228.63: Tehe. ♪ Every song gets my heart racing when I'm listening with you. Funny how that works!
228.64: Passion... I felt it with both mind and body... its true meaning.
228.65: This takes me back... I can't believe it's been so long... Wonder how that owl's doing...
228.66: Ah... My friend likes that one too...
228.67: Win or lose, you only get to stand on those stages once. The emotions of such moments can only be expressed through song and dance.
228.68: ...Her prayer will be answered. I can't analyze why, but I am sure of it.
228.69: Commencing Operation Audio Sample... These are fascinating sound waves.
228.70: I want to shine just like them and set a special record of my own... All right, it's bulking season!
228.71: Hey, you should try lifting while you listen to music. You'll get fit, and have fun while doing it!
228.72: A full-out clash of speed, and smiles at the end of the stretch... Ingredients for the perfect sumo stew!
228.73: Ohh, there are so many good songs! ♪ It's like music à la mode!
228.74: I've made my choice... I'm going to go down this path, and bring happiness to all!
228.75: When they were composing this song, the artists interviewed me... They really respected my feelings.
228.76: Hehe, I don't even know where to begin. Which one's your favorite?
228.77: Hehe, I don't even know where to begin. Which one's your favorite?
228.78: Blinding speed... Do they mean the speed of light, perhaps? Yes, that's it... we can learn from photons and their constant ways!
228.79: The electronic beeping comforts me. Just like the brain wave measurements I took while listening to this—pure euphoria!
228.80: Oh, keep browsing. I'm just gathering some data.
228.81: The choreography is really hard! I went all out shaking my tail and then... Aghh, just thinking about it hurts!
228.82: Taishin and Hayahide are always there for me when I need a good cry! That's what lets me keep barreling forward!
228.83: I like songs that hit you with a "bang!", but songs that are like "bam!" are cool too, don't you think?!
228.84: I too have a dream deep in my heart. Until that crown of glory is in my hands, I won't let anything stop me.
228.85: Toll... ♪ All these songs are so wonderful, I don't know which to choose.
228.86: I'm gonna run down the stretch hardest of all, and cross the finish with the cutest smile! My dream is right there in the lyrics. ♪
228.87: Everyone's been using the intro as music for their Umasta stories lately. Guess who started the trend. ♪
228.88: What do you wanna listen to? Maybe you could pick out a cute song for me. ♪
228.89: What do you wanna listen to? Maybe you could pick out a cute song for me. ♪
228.90: "Even if the whole world turns against us..." This part always makes my heart skip a beat. ♪ It's perfect for a princess and her prince!
228.91: This song reminds me of the day I made up my mind to become a princess... those first steps of mine.
228.92: My, what a delightful song! It's got me itching to throw a few punches!
228.93: I like how bubbly the song is overall, but like... do we really have to shake our tails like that?
228.94: Huh, guess I'll get to see what you're into. Well, don't keep me in suspense.
228.95: Hryahh! Wahh! Woohoo! Well, what do you think? I tried putting the song's emotions into words—with some Bakushin flair!
228.96: C'mon, Trainer, sing it with me! Bakushin Bakushin Bakushin! Okay, again! Count to 894!
228.97: Concerts should be studied for just like tests! Let's Bakushin to the music!
228.98: With you by my side, I can overcome any race. I'll prove that to you. ♪
228.99: Time for some music. ♪ Which song is your favorite?
228.100: I won't let anything get in the way of my running or my singing. ♪ That's how an Umadol rolls. ☆
228.101: I really like the album cover too. ♪ That's something you have to pay attention to as an Umadol!
228.102: I uploaded an UmaTok of this dance and it exploded! Actual peak choreography.
228.103: This song really hits right now... Been going through some stuff with the gals. I should probably apologize, shouldn't I...
228.104: I'm gonna do my nails, so can you put on something upbeat?
228.105: I'll prove that I'm the fastest! That I deserve to stand center stage!
228.106: I was listening to this with Ticket and she broke down crying all of a sudden... Never a quiet moment with her.
228.107: Just pick what you want. I'm fine with whatever.
228.108: Un... unlimited... impact? Oh, I get it! Like kaboom! Right?
228.109: Umapyoi, umapyoi. ♪ This song's fun when we all sing it together! Pyoi, pyoi, pyoooi!
228.110: My favorite is... Hehe. All of them!
228.111: As long as the Great Shiraoki is watching over me, I can make destiny my own!
228.112: I'm so lucky I get to spend these shining days surrounded by friends... Fortune must be on my side!
228.113: Woiya... Haiya... Which will be your lucky song?
228.114: I got to do a concert with Opera O... hehe. I-I kind of want to dance more. I know that's silly, but...
228.115: The goddess of victory would never notice me... B-but if I keep trying, maybe I'll have a chance one day!
228.116: Which song is your fray... fav... fraywit? Ahh, I'm sorry!
228.117: For the life of me, I can't dance this with a serious face. My default expression is so relaxed, you know? I dunno, I just like... ughh!
228.118: Trying to get some youthful passion in your system? Or are you saying you want to run for your dreams with me? ...That was a joke.
228.119: This kinda reminds me of home. My parents used to play a lot of these at the bar... It takes me back.
228.120: The tempo befits a first-rate runner, and the fastest one at that. It's like this song was made for me!
228.121: The song is busy, but that's part of the charm. I hear it whenever I get together with Spe and co, so it's burned into my brain now.
228.122: Ohoho! I grant you permission to choose a song of your liking!
228.123: Oh... Didn't know you liked this kind of music. Hmm, I guess you've got decent taste.
228.124: Oh, so this is the kind of music you listen to. Mind if I join you?
228.125: Won't you take me on a musical adventure?
228.126: This thing really free? Well, what're ya waitin' for? We gotta listen to all the songs at least once!
228.127: "Music is the bean paste to the bun of your heart." I want to know what flavors you like!
228.128: Any recommendations, Trainer? It might be fun to look into the song's history together.
228.129: ...If you want to clear your mind, having a song play in the background is better than sitting in silence.
228.130: From festive fun to tender tears, there's a song for every occasion!
228.131: Ooh, this makes me want to burst out in song! C'mon, let's do a duet!
228.132: Elegant, touching, and splendidly cheerful... All elements that make this song perfect for a winning concert.
228.133: I love this song. ♪ The precise choreography lets me express myself down to my very fingertips.
228.134: Performing this song live gets me fired up—literally! The dancers at the edges always get a little singed... Ha, just kiddin'!
228.135: This song reminds me of a blooming flower bud... Like it's the starting line to the dream ahead!
228.136: To sing this on stage amidst the thunderous music and dazzling lights... There could be no greater honor.
228.137: This song is special, so... If you're going to listen with me, no talking until it's over.
228.138: Hearing this song brings back memories of close races and festive concerts. It makes me want to break into a run!
228.139: I always gotta squeeze the mic real hard when performing this! It's just so cool!
228.140: I've come to associate this song with memories of sparkling, passionate races. Hehe, it makes me want to run! ♪
228.141: We've practiced this song so much at karaoke it's become a specialty. ♪ Next chance we get, we'll sing it for you.
228.142: This song's a banger, am I right? I love the way it makes me feel like I'm the wind, just like when I'm runnin'.
228.143: Talk about some touching lyrics! Makes you think of all the people who've helped you get this far...
228.144: A wonderful, inspiring song. It helps me believe in the time I've spent at this academy, as well as the days to come! ♪
228.145: I have to sing this at the next karaoke sesh! In fact, I'll message Nature, Ikuno, and Turbo right now... ♪
228.146: I recall enjoying this song in the passenger seat of Maruzensky's car. It brings to mind runners cutting a dashing figure, no?
228.147: Oh hey, I sang this with Falco and Fine at karaoke. They even taught me the moves!

271.100101:
I've made my feelings into chocolate! I want to 
cheer you up whenever you feel sad or frustrated, 
so I thought of carrots! You're the reason I've 
made it this far and why I'm still running. That's why 
I hope my emotions are clear! — From Spe

271.100201:
The snow in my hometown was quiet and pure, a white 
spreading as far as eyes could see. That scenery is one 
of my most precious and nostalgic memories. I wanted 
to convey that feeling… to you. I hope to keep running 
alongside you beyond the end of this landscape.

Here's a present for my always hard-working trainer! 
I hope you're honoured by my gift～♪ 
I made it myself, so take your time and savour it! 
Then tell me what you think of the taste too! 
Promise, okay? Looking forward to it!

to savour that thought one bite at a time.

Whenever I eat a ton, I get a warm and fuzzy feeling. 
I wanted you to experience that sort of emotion too, 
so I made it as big and generous as possible. 
I'd be happy if this filled you up. 

PS. Tell me if you can't eat any more.

of time rushes by swiftly. I have prepared you a few

297.100: $(scale 90)When the Hero Gauge is MAXed you can obtain a Hero Skill!
297.101: $(scale 70)Race expectations become even more exciting are after gaining a Hero Skill!
297.102: $(scale 90)Some Hero Skills can be activated by using Race Items!
297.103: $(scale 90)The Hero Gauge will be at MAX soon!
297.104: $(scale 75)It looks like your team's strong desire for racing will be a great strength!
297.200: $(scale 90)You can find a lot of info regarding League of Heroes here!
297.300: $(scale 70)Reaching PLATINUM1 confers a unique title with one eligible trainee's name!
297.302: $(scale 70)A trainee's "Tale" title can be obtained after the Main Stage ranks are determined!
297.303: $(scale 70)You can check the League Scores obtained by each trainee in the Main Stage here!
297.400: $(scale 90)You can use Race Items in the Main Stage.
297.401: $(scale 90)You can change your team name until the Main Stage ends.
297.402: $(scale 85)Your League Score is the total score obtained from all races.
297.403: $(scale 90)Weather and going are randomized every 5 races.
297.404: $(scale 90)You need to select 3 trainees to register a team.
297.500: $(scale 90)The Extra Stage is a one-shot race with 12 participants.
297.501: $(scale 90)Weather and going are randomized every race.
297.502: $(scale 90)Teams can be changed until the registration period ends.
297.503: $(scale 90)Race Items aren't usable in the Extra Stage.

325.1032:
A New Year countdown party is to be held at Tracen Academy. 
Preparations are well underway as all trainees look to send 
their gratitude to the fans who supported them over the year. 
Among them, Duramente, Royce and Royce, and Cheval Grand 
each harbor their own feelings within their hearts. Will they find an 
answer to their doubts within the exciting fan-centric atmosphere?
325.1054:
"The Beauty Dream Cup" is back again this year! Chosen as Muses,
Gentildonna and the others visit a mansion to take photos in their dresses.
However, what awaits them there are doors closing on their own,
unidentified shrieks... a series of undeniably suspicious phenomena.
Scream? Flee back home? No, the maidens will—face it head-on.

401.10001: Darley Arabian is the embodiment of courage. She was created in the virtual world by AI that adopted the name of the Three Goddesses, the predecessors to all Umamusume. Although she is free and uninhibited, she is always level-headed. She wishes for nothing more than the well-being of all Umamusume-kind.
401.10002: Godolphin Barb is the embodiment of love. She was created in the virtual world by AI that adopted the name of the Three Goddesses, the predecessors to all Umamusume. She treasures all of creation and watches over it with kindness. Although at times she tests racers to their limits, she does so out of affection.
401.10003: Byerley Turk is the embodiment of discipline. She was created in the virtual world by AI that adopted the name of the Three Goddesses, the predecessors to all Umamusume. Despite her commanding nature, her strictness comes from a good place. She believes that the way to carve out the future is through physical strength.

450.4:
Outrunners who are close to each other during the early 
or the middle phase expend energy for extra speed.
The strength and duration of this boost scale with Guts.
450.5:
Increases speed and acceleration when evenly 
matched with a competitor on the homestretch.
Strength scales with Guts.
450.6:
When Power is over 1200, acceleration in the last spurt is increased
in proportion to power conserved up to that point and the amount
of Power. Power isn't conserved during Rushes or Positioning Battles.
450.7:
When Stamina is over 1200, speed in the last spurt is
increased in races ≥2100 m when conditions are right.
The increase scales with Stamina.
450.8:
Trade energy for pace in the middle phase when far from
the lead or close to other competitors. Strength scales
with Power and Guts. Likelihood scales with Guts and Wit.
450.9:
Prevents Repositioning during the middle phase
when lacking energy to complete the final spurt.
Likelihood and accuracy scale with Wit.
450.10:
Trade energy for pace in the middle phase when too close 
to competitors whose running style positions them further back.
Strength scales with Guts. Likelihood scales with Wit.
450.12:
When Speed is over 2000, top speed in the last spurt is increased
when conditions are right. Speed uncap in the All-Out Spurt
increases with Power and Spurt Boost skills.
450.13:
Increases top speed in the late phase by expending energy.
Might be delayed or weakened when lacking energy.
Strength scales with Speed and Guts.
450.14:
Wastes energy on increased speed while disregarding positioning 
during the early or middle phases. Likelihood decreases with Wit.
450.15:
Start reaction time is deemed too slow when crossing
a set value. Some skills can shorten reaction time.
